papers.abstract_zh: 当今世界数据量巨大，归档存储系统在保存冷数据方面发挥着重要作用。由于严格的成本考虑，一种流行的设计是将磁盘组织成组并定期将它们打开以服务用户请求。因此，调度对于资本支出和性能都至关重要。不幸的是，现场结果表明现有的调度程序通常不是最优的。我们的进一步分析表明，主要原因是当前基于启发式的调度程序中不断变化的工作负载与固定的粗略配置参数集之间的不匹配。在本文中，我们提出了 MasterPlan，一种用于存档存储系统的基于强化学习 (RL) 的调度程序。通过识别档案存储服务的独特特征，我们为强化学习代理设计了状态空间和奖励函数。 MasterPlan 包括一个连续动作编码方法来保证有效的探索，以及一个元适应模块来提取工作负载系列的特征。实验表明，与现有解决方案相比，MasterPlan 可以实现 1.25 倍吞吐量、2.16 倍第 99 倍延迟和 1.47 倍功耗改进。

papers.title: Matrix: Multi-Cipher Structures Dataflow for Parallel and Pipelined TFHE Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Fully homomorphic encryption over torus (TFHE) enables the execution of arbitrary functions on encrypted data through programmable bootstrapping (PBS). However, performing all operations on ciphertext during PBS results in high computational and memory requirements, limiting the deployment of PBS in real-world scenarios. Previous TFHE accelerator designs have attempted to improve performance by employing specific dataflow and functional units, but these techniques may require large off-chip bandwidth or on-chip storage when scaling up computation capacity. Additionally, the design of specialized functional units may limit the utilization of computation units when facing dynamic secure parameter settings. To address these challenges and further improve PBS throughput in TFHE, we propose Matrix , an ASIC-based architecture that balances off-chip bandwidth and on-chip storage according to the execution flow of PBS. In Matrix , we utilize a unified special-prime-based processing element (PE) that achieves high utilization with minimal resource overhead. Furthermore, we propose a hybrid PBS dataflow that can efficiently reduce computation complexity and memory requirements. Compared to state-of-the-art TFHE accelerators, Matrix achieves 1.43 × -5.66 × throughput improvement for PBS. For ZAMA Deep-NN benchmark, we achieve 525.60× and 68.06× speedup compared to CPU and GPU, respectively. 1
papers.abstract_zh: 环面全同态加密 (TFHE) 允许通过可编程引导 (PBS) 对加密数据执行任意函数。然而，在 PBS 期间对密文执行所有操作会导致较高的计算和内存要求，限制了 PBS 在现实场景中的部署。以前的 TFHE 加速器设计试图通过采用特定的数据流和功能单元来提高性能，但这些技术在扩大计算容量时可能需要大量的片外带宽或片上存储。此外，在面对动态安全参数设置时，专用功能单元的设计可能会限制计算单元的利用。为了应对这些挑战并进一步提高 TFHE 中的 PBS 吞吐量，我们提出了 Matrix，这是一种基于 ASIC 的架构，可根据 PBS 的执行流程平衡片外带宽和片上存储。在 Matrix 中，我们利用统一的基于特殊素数的处理元素 (PE)，以最小的资源开销实现高利用率。此外，我们提出了一种混合 PBS 数据流，可以有效降低计算复杂度和内存需求。与最先进的 TFHE 加速器相比，Matrix 的 PBS 吞吐量提高了 1.43 × -5.66 ×。对于 ZAMA Deep-NN 基准测试，与 CPU 和 GPU 相比，我们分别实现了 525.60 倍和 68.06 倍的加速。 1

papers.title: Maximizing Data and Hardware Reuse for HLS with Early-Stage Symbolic Partitioning.
papers.abstract: While traditional High-Level Synthesis (HLS) converts “high-level” C-like programs into hardware automatically, producing high-performance designs still requires hardware expertise. Optimizations such as data partitioning can have a large impact on performance since they directly affect data reuse patterns and the ability to reuse hardware. However, optimizing partitioning is a difficult process since minor changes in the parameter choices can lead to totally unpredictable performance. Functional array-based languages have been proposed instead of C-based approaches, as they offer stronger performance guarantees. This article proposes to follow a similar approach and exposes a divide-and-conquer primitive at the algorithmic level to let users partition any arbitrary computation. The compiler is then free to explore different partition shapes to maximize both data and hardware reuse automatically. The main challenge remains that the impact of partitioning is only known much later in the compilation flow. This is due to the hard-to-predict effects of the many optimizations applied during compilation. To solve this problem, the partitioning is expressed using a set of symbolic tunable parameters, introduced early in the compilation pipeline. A symbolic performance model is then used in the last compilation stage to predict performance based on the possible values of the tunable parameters. Using this approach, a design space exploration is conducted on an Intel Arria 10 Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), and competitive performance is achieved on the classical VGG and TinyYolo neural networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然传统的高级综合 (HLS) 自动将“高级”类 C 程序转换为硬件，但生成高性能设计仍然需要硬件专业知识。数据分区等优化会对性能产生很大影响，因为它们直接影响数据重用模式和重用硬件的能力。然而，优化分区是一个困难的过程，因为参数选择的微小变化可能会导致完全不可预测的性能。人们提出了基于函数数组的语言来代替基于 C 的方法，因为它们提供了更强的性能保证。本文建议遵循类似的方法，并在算法级别公开分而治之的原语，让用户可以划分任意计算。然后，编译器可以自由地探索不同的分区形状，以自动最大化数据和硬件的重用。主要的挑战仍然是分区的影响只有在编译流程的后期才能知道。这是由于编译期间应用的许多优化的效果难以预测。为了解决这个问题，分区是使用一组符号可调参数来表示的，这些参数在编译管道的早期引入。然后，在最后的编译阶段使用符号性能模型来根据可调参数的可能值来预测性能。使用这种方法，在英特尔 Arria 10 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 上进行设计空间探索，并在经典 VGG 和 TinyYolo 神经网络上实现了具有竞争力的性能。

papers.title: MemoriaNova: Optimizing Memory-Aware Model Inference for Edge Computing.
papers.abstract: In recent years, deploying deep learning models on edge devices has become pervasive, driven by the increasing demand for intelligent edge computing solutions across various industries. From industrial automation to intelligent surveillance and healthcare, edge devices are being leveraged for real-time analytics and decision-making. Existing methods face two challenges when deploying machine learning models on edge devices. The first challenge is handling the execution order of operators with a simple strategy, which can lead to a potential waste of memory resources when dealing with directed acyclic graph structure models. The second challenge is that they usually process operators of a model one by one to optimize the inference latency, which may lead to the optimization problem getting trapped in local optima. We present MemoriaNova, comprising BTSearch and GenEFlow, to solve these two problems. BTSearch is a graph state backtracking algorithm with efficient pruning and hashing strategies designed to minimize memory overhead during inference and enlarge latency optimization search space. GenEFlow, based on genetic algorithms (GA), integrates latency modeling, and memory constraints to optimize distributed inference latency. This innovative approach considers a comprehensive search space for model partitioning, ensuring robust and adaptable solutions. We implement BTSearch and GenEFlow and test them on 11 deep-learning models with different structures and scales. The results show that BTSearch can reach 12% memory optimization compared with the widely used random execution strategy. At the same time, GenEFlow reduces inference latency by 33.9% in distributed systems with four-edge devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，由于各行业对智能边缘计算解决方案的需求不断增长，在边缘设备上部署深度学习模型已变得普遍。从工业自动化到智能监控和医疗保健，边缘设备被用于实时分析和决策。在边缘设备上部署机器学习模型时，现有方法面临两个挑战。第一个挑战是用简单的策略处理运算符的执行顺序，这在处理有向无环图结构模型时可能会导致内存资源的潜在浪费。第二个挑战是，他们通常会逐一处理模型的算子来优化推理延迟，这可能会导致优化问题陷入局部最优。我们提出了 MemoriaNova，包括 BTSearch 和 GenEFlow，来解决这两个问题。 BTSearch 是一种图状态回溯算法，具有高效的修剪和哈希策略，旨在最大限度地减少推理过程中的内存开销并扩大延迟优化搜索空间。 GenEFlow 基于遗传算法 (GA)，集成延迟建模和内存约束来优化分布式推理延迟。这种创新方法考虑了模型分区的全面搜索空间，确保了稳健且适应性强的解决方案。我们实现了 BTSearch 和 GenEFlow，并在 11 个不同结构和规模的深度学习模型上对其进行了测试。结果表明，与广泛使用的随机执行策略相比，BTSearch 可以达到 12% 的内存优化。同时，GenEFlow 在具有四边缘设备的分布式系统中将推理延迟降低了 33.9%。

papers.title: MetaEC: An Efficient and Resilient Erasure-Coded KV Store on Disaggregated Memory.
papers.abstract: In-memory KV stores have recently been migrated from traditional monolithic servers to disaggregated memory (DM) for higher resource utilization and elasticity. These works use replication-based schemes for fault tolerance, which can be replaced with erasure coding (EC) for space efficiency. However, existing EC schemes designed in KV stores on traditional monolithic architectures encounter performance constraints when directly implemented in DM due to the challenges in EC metadata management and consistent parity updating. This article proposes MetaEC, an erasure-coded KV store on DM with high efficiency and resilience. First, for organizing KV pairs to stripes, MetaEC logically forms data chunks and leverages lazy coding to remove the accumulating and coding latency from the critical path. Second, for efficient EC metadata management, MetaEC designs EC metadata structures based on accessing features, and employs a hybrid redundancy schema with deterministic distribution to provide fault tolerance with high storage efficiency. Third, for consistent parity updating, we design a parity updating protocol based on parity logging and co-design EC metadata structures to handle concurrent conflicts by allowing only concurrent reads or writes. Experimental results show that compared with the state-of-the-art replication-based KV stores on DM, MetaEC achieves up to 53.33% latency reduction, up to 31.01% throughput improvement, and 58.17% memory consumption savings.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存中的 KV 存储最近已从传统的整体服务器迁移到分解内存 (DM)，以实现更高的资源利用率和弹性。这些工作使用基于复制的方案来实现容错，可以用纠删码（EC）代替以提高空间效率。然而，由于 EC 元数据管理和一致奇偶校验更新方面的挑战，在传统整体架构上的 KV 存储中设计的现有 EC 方案在直接在 DM 中实现时会遇到性能限制。本文提出了 MetaEC，一种在 DM 上具有高效率和弹性的纠删码 KV 存储。首先，为了将 KV 对组织成条带，MetaEC 逻辑地形成数据块，并利用惰性编码来消除关键路径中的累积和编码延迟。其次，为了高效的EC元数据管理，MetaEC根据访问特征设计EC元数据结构，并采用具有确定性分布的混合冗余模式来提供高存储效率的容错能力。第三，为了实现一致的奇偶校验更新，我们设计了基于奇偶校验日志记录的奇偶校验更新协议，并共同设计了 EC 元数据结构，通过仅允许并发读取或写入来处理并发冲突。实验结果表明，与 DM 上最先进的基于复制的 KV 存储相比，MetaEC 实现了高达 53.33% 的延迟减少、高达 31.01% 的吞吐量提升以及 58.17% 的内存消耗节省。

papers.title: Mobile-3DCNN: An Acceleration Framework for Ultra-Real-Time Execution of Large 3D CNNs on Mobile Devices.
papers.abstract: It is challenging to deploy 3D Convolutional Neural Networks (3D CNNs) on mobile devices, specifically if both real-time execution and high inference accuracy are in demand, because the increasingly large model size and complex model structure of 3D CNNs usually require tremendous computation and memory resources. Weight pruning is proposed to mitigate this challenge. However, existing pruning is either not compatible with modern parallel architectures, resulting in long inference latency or subject to significant accuracy degradation. This article proposes an end-to-end 3D CNN acceleration framework based on pruning/compilation co-design called Mobile-3DCNN that consists of two parts: a novel, fine-grained structured pruning enhanced by a prune/Winograd adaptive selection (that is mobile-hardware-friendly and can achieve high pruning accuracy), and a set of compiler optimization and code generation techniques enabled by our pruning (to fully transform the pruning benefit to real performance gains). The evaluation demonstrates that Mobile-3DCNN outperforms state-of-the-art end-to-end DNN acceleration frameworks that support 3D CNN execution on mobile devices, Alibaba Mobile Neural Networks and Pytorch-Mobile with speedup up to 34× with minor accuracy degradation, proving it is possible to execute high-accuracy large 3D CNNs on mobile devices in real-time (or even ultra-real-time).
papers.abstract_zh: 在移动设备上部署 3D 卷积神经网络 (3D CNN) 具有挑战性，特别是在需要实时执行和高推理精度的情况下，因为 3D CNN 日益庞大的模型尺寸和复杂的模型结构通常需要巨大的计算和内存资源。提出权重修剪来缓解这一挑战。然而，现有的剪枝要么与现代并行架构不兼容，导致推理延迟较长，要么精度显着下降。本文提出了一种基于剪枝/编译协同设计的端到端 3D CNN 加速框架，称为 Mobile-3DCNN，它由两部分组成：通过剪枝/Winograd 自适应选择增强的新颖的细粒度结构化剪枝（即移动硬件友好且可以实现高剪枝精度），以及由我们的剪枝启用的一组编译器优化和代码生成技术（将剪枝优势完全转化为真正的性能增益）。评估表明，Mobile-3DCNN 的性能优于支持在移动设备上执行 3D CNN 的最先进的端到端 DNN 加速框架、阿里巴巴移动神经网络和 Pytorch-Mobile，加速高达 34 倍，且精度下降较小，证明在移动设备上实时（甚至超实时）执行高精度大型 3D CNN 是可能的。

papers.title: ModNEF : An Open Source Modular Neuromorphic Emulator for FPGA for Low-Power In-Edge Artificial Intelligence.
papers.abstract: Neuromorphic computing is a novel computational paradigm that draws inspiration from the structure and function of the human brain. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are a promising approach for implementing energy-efficient Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) in embedded systems. In this article, we present ModNEF, an open-source, neuromorphic digital hardware architecture designed for Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). ModNEF is based on a modular architecture, where independent modules communicate via point-to-point connections to emulate SNNs. Our architecture offers two neuron models based on the Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) model, with a different emulation strategy. The modular nature of ModNEF allows researchers to extend the architecture by developing new modules to emulate different types of neurons or implement online learning rules. ModNEF is a clock-driven emulator, meaning that the neuron state is updated at regular intervals, even in the absence of input data. We evaluated the performance of the emulator using the MNIST and NMNIST datasets, with offline, full-precision training.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经形态计算是一种新颖的计算范式，其灵感来自于人脑的结构和功能。尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是在嵌入式系统中实现节能人工神经网络 (ANN) 的一种很有前途的方法。在本文中，我们介绍 ModNEF，这是一种专为现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 设计的开源神经形态数字硬件架构。 ModNEF 基于模块化架构，其中独立模块通过点对点连接进行通信以模拟 SNN。我们的架构提供了两种基于 Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF) 模型的神经元模型，并具有不同的仿真策略。 ModNEF 的模块化特性允许研究人员通过开发新模块来模拟不同类型的神经元或实施在线学习规则来扩展架构。 ModNEF 是一个时钟驱动的模拟器，这意味着即使没有输入数据，神经元状态也会定期更新。我们使用 MNIST 和 NMNIST 数据集以及离线、全精度训练来评估模拟器的性能。

papers.title: Multiple Function Merging for Code Size Reduction.
papers.abstract: Resource-constrained environments, such as embedded devices, have limited amounts of memory and storage. Practical programming languages such as C++ and Rust tend to output multiple similar functions by monomorphizing polymorphic functions. An optimization technique called Function Merging, which merges similar functions into a single function, has been studied. However, in the state-of-the-art approach, the number of functions that can be merged at once is limited to two; thus, efficiently merging three or more functions, which are often generated from polymorphic functions, has been impossible. In this study, we propose Multiple Function Merging optimization, which targets merging three or more similar functions into a single function using a multiple sequence alignment algorithm. With multiple aligned information, Multiple Function Merging can increase merge opportunities and reduce extra branching overheads at the code generation stage. We evaluated it using the SPEC CPU benchmark suite and some large-scale C/C++ programs, and the results show that it reduces code size by as much as 7.61% compared with the state-of-the-art approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 资源受限的环境（例如嵌入式设备）的内存和存储量有限。 C++和Rust等实用编程语言倾向于通过单态化多态函数来输出多个相似的函数。人们已经研究了一种称为“函数合并”的优化技术，该技术将相似的函数合并为单个函数。然而，在最先进的方法中，一次可以合并的功能数量仅限于两个；因此，有效地合并通常由多态函数生成的三个或更多函数是不可能的。在本研究中，我们提出了多函数合并优化，其目标是使用多序列比对算法将三个或更多相似函数合并为单个函数。通过多个对齐信息，多函数合并可以增加合并机会并减少代码生成阶段的额外分支开销。我们使用 SPEC CPU 基准测试套件和一些大型 C/C++ 程序对其进行了评估，结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，它减少了高达 7.61% 的代码大小。

papers.title: ODGS: Dependency-Aware Scheduling for High-Level Synthesis with Graph Neural Network and Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Scheduling determines the execution order and time of operations in a program. The order is related to operation dependencies, including data and resource dependencies. Data dependency is intrinsic in a program, showing operation data flow. Resource dependency is determined by scheduling methods, resolving operation resource contention. Existing scheduling methods focus on data dependency, rather than building and exploiting operation dependency graph (ODG) with extra resource dependency. As ODG contains all dependencies determining operation execution order, it provides global program information, facilitating efficient scheduling. In this work, we propose ODGS, a dependency-aware scheduling method for high-level synthesis with graph neural network (GNN) and reinforcement learning (RL). We adopt GNN to perceive accurate relations between operations. We use the relations to guide an RL agent in building a complete ODG. We perform feedback-guided iterative scheduling with ODG to converge to a high-quality solution. Experiments show that our method reduces 16.4% latency and 26.5% resource usage on average, compared with the latest RL-based method. Moreover, we reduce an average 2.9% latency over the GNN-based method under the same resource usage. The same resource usage is obtained by improving the GNN-based method with manual resource constraint tuning. Without tuning, its basic version consumes an average 237.6% more resources than our method.
papers.abstract_zh: 调度决定程序中操作的执行顺序和时间。顺序与操作依赖有关，包括数据依赖和资源依赖。数据依赖是程序中固有的，表现出操作数据流。通过调度方法确定资源依赖性，解决操作资源争用。现有的调度方法侧重于数据依赖性，而不是构建和利用具有额外资源依赖性的操作依赖图（ODG）。由于ODG包含了决定操作执行顺序的所有依赖关系，因此它提供了全局程序信息，有利于高效调度。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ODGS，一种依赖感知调度方法，用于图神经网络 (GNN) 和强化学习 (RL) 的高级综合。我们采用 GNN 来感知操作之间的准确关系。我们使用这些关系来指导 RL 代理构建完整的 ODG。我们使用 ODG 执行反馈引导的迭代调度，以收敛到高质量的解决方案。实验表明，与最新的基于 RL 的方法相比，我们的方法平均减少了 16.4% 的延迟和 26.5% 的资源使用。此外，在相同的资源使用情况下，我们比基于 GNN 的方法平均减少了 2.9% 的延迟。通过手动资源约束调整改进基于 GNN 的方法获得了相同的资源使用率。在不进行调优的情况下，其基本版本比我们的方法平均多消耗 237.6% 的资源。

papers.title: OptiFX: Automatic Optimization for Convolutional Neural Networks with Aggressive Operator Fusion on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are fundamental to advancing computer vision technologies. As CNNs become more complex and larger, optimizing model inference remains a critical challenge in both industry and academia. On modern GPU platforms, CNN operators are typically memory-bound, leading to significant performance degradation due to memory wall effects. While recent advancements have utilized operator fusion–merging multiple operators into one–to enhance inference performance, the fusion of multiple region-based operators like convolution is seldom addressed. This article introduces AFusion , a novel operator fusion technique aimed at improving inference performance, and OptiFX, an automatic optimization framework based on this approach. OptiFX employs a cost-based backtracking search to identify optimal sub-graphs for fusion and utilizes template-based code generation to create efficient kernels for these fused sub-graphs. We evaluate OptiFX across seven prominent CNN architectures–GoogLeNet, ResNet, DenseNet, MobileNet, SqueezeNet, NasNet, and UNet–on Nvidia A6000 Ada, RTX 4090, and Jetson AGX Orin platforms. Our results demonstrate that OptiFX significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving average speedups of \(2.91\times\) , \(3.30\times\) , and \(2.09\times\) in accelerating inference performance on these platforms, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 是推进计算机视觉技术的基础。随着 CNN 变得越来越复杂、规模越来越大，优化模型推理仍然是工业界和学术界面临的严峻挑战。在现代 GPU 平台上，CNN 运算符通常受内存限制，由于内存墙效应，导致性能显着下降。虽然最近的进展利用算子融合（将多个算子合并为一个算子）来增强推理性能，但很少解决基于多个区域的算子（例如卷积）的融合。本文介绍了 AFusion，一种旨在提高推理性能的新型算子融合技术，以及 OptiFX，一种基于该方法的自动优化框架。 OptiFX 采用基于成本的回溯搜索来识别用于融合的最佳子图，并利用基于模板的代码生成为这些融合子图创建高效的内核。我们在 Nvidia A6000 Ada、RTX 4090 和 Jetson AGX Orin 平台上评估了七个著名 CNN 架构（GoogLeNet、ResNet、DenseNet、MobileNet、SqueezeNet、NasNet 和 UNet）的 OptiFX。我们的结果表明，OptiFX 显着优于现有方法，在加速这些平台上的推理性能方面分别实现了 \(2.91\times\)、\(3.30\times\) 和 \(2.09\times\) 的平均加速。

papers.title: Overlapping Aware Data Placement Optimizations for LSM Tree-Based Store on ZNS SSDs.
papers.abstract: Solid State Drives (SSDs) based on the NVMe Zoned Namespaces (ZNS) interface can notably reduce the costs of address mapping, garbage collection, and over-provisioning by dividing the storage space into multiple zones for sequential writes and random reads. The Log-Structured Merge (LSM) tree, which is extensively used in key-value storage systems, converts random writes to sequential writes, hence a suitable scenario to utilize ZNS SSDs. However, LSM tree associated data significantly varies in lifetime due to the levels and merging mechanisms of the LSM tree. Therefore, without an accurate method to estimate data lifetime, data with disparate lifetimes may be placed in the same zone, thus causing low space utilization and high write amplification within the SSD. To address these issues, the article proposes two data overlapping aware optimizations to realize intelligent data placement: a zone allocation scheme and a garbage collection scheme. The key technique of these optimizations is an accurate data-lifetime estimation by considering both the associated tree level of the data and the data overlapping ratio between the data and those in the neighboring level. Using the estimation technique, the zone allocation optimization can place data with similar lifetimes in the same zone. Besides, the garbage collection optimization can reclaim zones in an adaptive manner based on overlapping ratios to reduce the amount of data migration. Experimental results demonstrate that the optimization schemes effectively reduce garbage collection-incurred data copy by average factors of 2.11× and 1.50× in comparison to a conventional work and a state-of-the-art work, respectively. Consequently, the proposed work successfully alleviates the write amplification effect by 18% and 6%, compared to the conventional work and the state-of-the-art work, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于NVMe分区命名空间（ZNS）接口的固态硬盘（SSD）可以通过将存储空间划分为多个区域进行顺序写入和随机读取，显着降低地址映射、垃圾收集和预留空间的成本。日志结构合并（LSM）树广泛应用于键值存储系统，它将随机写入转换为顺序写入，因此是使用ZNS SSD的合适场景。然而，由于 LSM 树的级别和合并机制，LSM 树关联数据的生命周期存在显着差异。因此，如果没有准确的方法来估计数据寿命，不同寿命的数据可能会被放置在同一区域中，从而导致SSD内的空间利用率低和写放大高。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了两种数据重叠感知优化来实现智能数据放置：区域分配方案和垃圾收集方案。这些优化的关键技术是通过考虑数据的关联树级别以及数据与相邻级别中的数据之间的数据重叠率来准确估计数据生命周期。使用估计技术，区域分配优化可以将具有相似生命周期的数据放置在同一区域中。此外，垃圾收集优化可以根据重叠率自适应地回收区域，以减少数据迁移量。实验结果表明，与传统工作和最先进的工作相比，该优化方案有效地减少了垃圾收集引起的数据复制，平均因子分别为 2.11 倍和 1.50 倍。因此，与传统工作和最先进的工作相比，所提出的工作成功地将写放大效应分别减轻了 18% 和 6%。

papers.title: PANDA: Adaptive Prefetching and Decentralized Scheduling for Dataflow Architectures.
papers.abstract: Dataflow architectures are considered promising architecture, offering a commendable balance of performance, efficiency, and flexibility. Abundant prior works have been proposed to improve the performance of dataflow architectures. Nevertheless, these solutions can be further improved due to the lack of efficient data prefetching and flexible task scheduling. In this article, we propose a novel dataflow architecture with adaptive p refetching an d d ecentr a lized scheduling (PANDA). First, we present an application-adaptive data prefetching method and on-chip memory microarchitecture designed to overlap memory access latency. Second, we introduce a decentralized dataflow scheduling approach and processing element (PE) microarchitecture aimed at improving hardware utilization. Experimental results show that in a wide range of real-world applications, PANDA attains up to 2.53× performance improvement and 1.79× energy efficiency improvement over the state-of-the-art dataflow architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据流架构被认为是有前途的架构，提供了性能、效率和灵活性之间值得称赞的平衡。之前已经提出了大量的工作来提高数据流架构的性能。然而，由于缺乏高效的数据预取和灵活的任务调度，这些解决方案还可以进一步改进。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有自适应预取和分散调度（PANDA）的新型数据流架构。首先，我们提出了一种应用自适应数据预取方法和旨在重叠内存访问延迟的片上内存微架构。其次，我们引入了一种分散式数据流调度方法和处理元件（PE）微架构，旨在提高硬件利用率。实验结果表明，在广泛的实际应用中，PANDA 比最先进的数据流架构实现了高达 2.53 倍的性能提升和 1.79 倍的能效提升。

papers.title: PARADISE: Criticality-Aware Instruction Reordering for Power Attack Resistance.
papers.abstract: Power side-channel attacks exploit the correlation of power consumption with the instructions and data being processed to extract secrets from a device (e.g., cryptographic keys). Prior work primarily focused on protecting small embedded micro-controllers and in-order processors rather than high-performance, out-of-order desktop and server CPUs. In this article, we present Paradise , a general-purpose out-of-order processor with always-on protection, that implements a novel dynamic instruction scheduler to provide obfuscated execution and mitigate power analysis attacks. To achieve this, we exploit the time between operand availability of critical instructions ( slack ) and create high-performance random schedules. Further, we highlight the dangers of using incorrect adversarial assumptions, which can often lead to a false sense of security. Therefore, we perform an extended security analysis on AES-128 using different levels of adversaries, from basic to advanced, including a convolution neural networks–based attack. Our advanced security evaluation assumes a strong adversary with full knowledge of the countermeasure and demonstrates a significant security improvement of 556 × when combined with Boolean Masking over a baseline only protected by masking and 62,500× over an unprotected baseline. The resulting overhead in performance, power, and area of Paradise is 3.2%, 1.2%, and 0.8% respectively. 1
papers.abstract_zh: 电源侧信道攻击利用功耗与正在处理的指令和数据的相关性来从设备中提取秘密（例如加密密钥）。之前的工作主要集中于保护小型嵌入式微控制器和有序处理器，而不是高性能、无序桌面和服务器 CPU。在本文中，我们介绍了 Paradise，这是一种具有始终在线保护的通用乱序处理器，它实现了一种新颖的动态指令调度程序，以提供模糊执行并减轻功耗分析攻击。为了实现这一目标，我们利用关键指令的操作数可用性之间的时间（松弛）并创建高性能随机调度。此外，我们强调使用不正确的对抗性假设的危险，这通常会导致错误的安全感。因此，我们使用从基础到高级的不同级别的对手，包括基于卷积神经网络的攻击，对 AES-128 进行扩展的安全分析。我们的高级安全评估假设强大的对手完全了解对策，并且与布尔屏蔽相结合，在仅受屏蔽保护的基线上显着提高了 556 倍的安全性，在未受保护的基线上提高了 62,500 倍。由此产生的 Paradise 性能、功耗和面积开销分别为 3.2%、1.2% 和 0.8%。 1

papers.title: Partitioned Scheduling and Analysis for a Typed DAG Task on Heterogeneous Multi-Cores.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous multi-core architectures are gaining popularity in recent years as they combine the benefits of different processors, resulting in improved execution capacity and energy efficiency. However, analyzing response times and allocating resources for the typed directed acyclic graph (DAG) task, which has complex execution logic, on heterogeneous multi-core systems poses significant challenges. Major approaches may yield overly pessimistic worst-case response time (WCRT) estimates in certain scenarios while failing to adequately address critical structural characteristics inherent to typed DAG tasks. To address these limitations, this article explores the WCRT analysis and core allocations for the typed DAG task under partitioned scheduling. In this work, we first delve into the characteristics of the topology structure of the typed DAG task and propose a novel WCRT upper bound to enhance the accuracy of WCRT analysis. Then, a subtask allocation strategy is presented, which enables an effectively utilization of the resources of multi-cores. Finally, the performance of the proposed analysis algorithm and allocation strategy are tested by implementing a verification system on a real heterogeneous multi-core platform. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed WCRT analysis algorithm exhibits substantial improvements of 38.7% and 37.43% in the theoretical analysis performance and actual analysis accuracy, respectively. Similarly, our proposed core allocation strategy improves the theoretical and the actual execution efficiency of the system by 10.6% and 7.41%, respectively. These results substantiate the practical value of our enhanced WCRT derivation methodology and allocation scheme in improving system resource utilization efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，异构多核架构越来越受欢迎，因为它们结合了不同处理器的优点，从而提高了执行能力和能源效率。然而，在异构多核系统上分析具有复杂执行逻辑的有向无环图（DAG）任务的响应时间和分配资源提出了重大挑战。在某些情况下，主要方法可能会产生过于悲观的最坏情况响应时间 (WCRT) 估计，同时无法充分解决类型化 DAG 任务固有的关键结构特征。为了解决这些限制，本文探讨了分区调度下类型化 DAG 任务的 WCRT 分析和核心分配。在这项工作中，我们首先深入研究了类型化 DAG 任务的拓扑结构的特点，并提出了一种新颖的 WCRT 上限来提高 WCRT 分析的准确性。然后提出了一种子任务分配策略，能够有效利用多核资源。最后，通过在真实的异构多核平台上实现验证系统来测试所提出的分析算法和分配策略的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的WCRT分析算法在理论分析性能和实际分析精度方面分别有了38.7%和37.43%的大幅提升。同样，我们提出的核心分配策略将系统的理论和实际执行效率分别提高了10.6%和7.41%。这些结果证实了我们增强的WCRT推导方法和分配方案在提高系统资源利用效率方面的实用价值。

papers.title: Performance Implications of Pipelining the Data Transfer in CPU-GPU Heterogeneous Systems.
papers.abstract: Driven by the increasing demands of machine learning, heterogeneous systems combining CPUs and GPUs have emerged as the dominant architecture for parallel computing in recent years. To optimize memory management and data transfer between CPUs and GPUs, Nvidia GPUs have introduced unified virtual memory ( UVM ) and pinned memory ( PM ) over the last decade. UVM can avoid explicit memory copies and potentially overlap GPU kernel computations with CPU-GPU data transfer. PM ensures that data with high locality remains in the main memory, preventing it from being paged out. In addition to these two techniques, asynchronous memory copy ( Async Memcpy ) was introduced recently in Nvidia GPUs to improve the CPU-GPU pipeline further. By utilizing Async Memcpy , the data transfer from GPU global memory to shared memory can be overlapped with GPU computations, adding an additional stage to the CPU-GPU data transfer pipeline. A thorough performance analysis of how Async Memcpy affects the current UVM and PM CPU-GPU data transfer scheme is desired. In this article, we provide performance implications of the combined effect of UVM , PM , and Async Memcpy , exploring which applications benefit from which combination of these features. We implement all these features on a suite of 25 workloads, including microbenchmarks and realworld applications. We observe an average performance gain of 24% when utilizing UVM and a 34% gain when employing PM on realworld applications, compared to not applying any data transfer optimization techniques. The performance benefits of Async Memcpy vary across different workloads. For workloads featuring extensive shared memory usage and high compute density (e.g., kmeans and lud ), Async Memcpy delivers around a 20% performance improvement over using UVM or PM alone. In other workloads like knn , we note a 20% performance degradation when using Async Memcpy . Furthermore, we conduct an in-depth investigation of the GPU kernel using performance counters to uncover the root causes of performance differences among various data transfer models. We also perform sensitivity analyses to examine how the number of blocks and threads, as well as the L1-cache/shared memory partitioning, impact performance. We explore future research directions aimed at enhancing the data transfer pipeline by overlapping memory allocation with data transfer and computation across GPU kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，在机器学习需求不断增长的推动下，CPU和GPU相结合的异构系统已成为并行计算的主导架构。为了优化 CPU 和 GPU 之间的内存管理和数据传输，Nvidia GPU 在过去十年中引入了统一虚拟内存 (UVM) 和固定内存 (PM)。 UVM 可以避免显式内存复制，并可能使 GPU 内核计算与 CPU-GPU 数据传输重叠。 PM 确保具有高局部性的数据保留在主内存中，防止其被调出。除了这两种技术之外，Nvidia GPU 最近还引入了异步内存复制 (Async Memcpy)，以进一步改进 CPU-GPU 管道。通过利用 Async Memcpy ，从 GPU 全局内存到共享内存的数据传输可以与 GPU 计算重叠，从而为 CPU-GPU 数据传输管道添加一个额外的阶段。需要对 Async Memcpy 如何影响当前 UVM 和 PM CPU-GPU 数据传输方案进行彻底的性能分析。在本文中，我们提供 UVM 、 PM 和 Async Memcpy 的综合效果的性能影响，探索哪些应用程序受益于这些功能的组合。我们在一套包含 25 个工作负载的套件上实现了所有这些功能，包括微基准测试和实际应用程序。我们观察到，与不应用任何数据传输优化技术相比，在实际应用中使用 UVM 时平均性能提升 24%，使用 PM 时平均性能提升 34%。 Async Memcpy 的性能优势因不同的工作负载而异。对于具有大量共享内存使用和高计算密度（例如 kmeans 和 lud ）的工作负载，Async Memcpy 比单独使用 UVM 或 PM 提供约 20% 的性能提升。在 knn 等其他工作负载中，我们注意到使用 Async Memcpy 时性能会下降 20%。此外，我们使用性能计数器对 GPU 内核进行深入研究，以揭示各种数据传输模型之间性能差异的根本原因。我们还执行敏感性分析，以检查块和线程的数量以及 L1 缓存/共享内存分区如何影响性能。我们探索未来的研究方向，旨在通过将内存分配与跨 GPU 内核的数据传输和计算重叠来增强数据传输管道。

papers.title: Performance, Energy and NVM Lifetime-Aware Data Structure Refinement and Placement for Heterogeneous Memory Systems.
papers.abstract: The need for increased memory capacity, which also needs to be affordable and sustainable, leads to the adoption of heterogeneous memory hierarchies, combining DRAM and NVM technologies. This work proposes a memory management methodology that relies on multi-objective optimization in terms of performance, energy consumption and impact on NVM’s lifetime, for applications deployed on heterogeneous (i.e., DRAM/NVM) memory systems. We propose a scalable and lightweight data structure exploration flow for supporting data type refinement based on access pattern analysis, enhanced with a weighted-based data placement decision support for multi-objective exploration and optimization. The evaluation of the methodology was performed both on emulated and real DRAM/NVM hardware for different applications and data placement algorithms. The experimental results show up to 58.7% lower execution time and 48.3% less energy consumption compared with the results obtained by the initial versions of the applications. Moreover, we observed 72.6% less NVM write operations, which can significantly extend the lifetime of the NVM memory. Finally, thorough evaluation shows that the methodology is flexible and scalable, as it can integrate different data placement algorithms and NVM technologies and requires reasonable exploration time.
papers.abstract_zh: 对增加内存容量的需求，同时还需要经济实惠且可持续，导致采用异构内存层次结构，结合 DRAM 和 NVM 技术。这项工作提出了一种内存管理方法，该方法依赖于性能、能耗和对 NVM 寿命影响方面的多目标优化，适用于部署在异构（即 DRAM/NVM）内存系统上的应用程序。我们提出了一种可扩展且轻量级的数据结构探索流程，用于支持基于访问模式分析的数据类型细化，并通过基于加权的数据放置决策支持来增强多目标探索和优化。该方法的评估是在针对不同应用和数据放置算法的仿真和真实 DRAM/NVM 硬件上进行的。实验结果显示，与应用程序初始版本获得的结果相比，执行时间缩短了 58.7%，能耗降低了 48.3%。此外，我们观察到 NVM 写入操作减少了 72.6%，这可以显着延长 NVM 内存的使用寿命。最后，全面的评估表明该方法是灵活且可扩展的，因为它可以集成不同的数据放置算法和 NVM 技术，并且需要合理的探索时间。

papers.title: PRAGA: A Priority-Aware Hardware/Software Co-design for High-Throughput Graph Processing Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Graph processing is pivotal in deriving insights from complex data structures but faces performance limitations due to the irregular nature of graphs. Traditional general-purpose processors often struggle with low instruction-level parallelism and energy inefficiency when handling graph data. In response, modern graph accelerators have embraced an intra-edge-parallel model to enhance parallelization, significantly outperforming conventional processors. However, the indiscriminate processing of edges in existing systems results in substantial computational redundancy, negatively impacting overall efficiency. This article introduces PRAGA, an innovative graph accelerator designed to optimize efficiency by selectively processing edges that significantly contribute to final results while preserving high computational parallelism. PRAGA utilizes an intra-edge-sequential model, prioritizing edge processing to capitalize on coarse-grained vertex-level parallelism and minimize unnecessary computations. It incorporates a hot-value manager to alleviate network-on-chip congestion and a memory-aware coalescer to minimize redundant data accesses. Our experimental results, obtained using a Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA accelerator card, demonstrate that PRAGA achieves speedups of 17.88× and 5.86× over state-of-the-art accelerators ScalaGraph and GraphDyns, respectively, and outperforms the advanced GPU-based system Gunrock by 22.52× on average. This substantial improvement underscores PRAGA’s potential to redefine performance benchmarks in graph processing.
papers.abstract_zh: 图处理对于从复杂的数据结构中获取洞察至关重要，但由于图的不规则性质而面临性能限制。传统的通用处理器在处理图形数据时常常面临指令级并行性低和能源效率低的问题。为此，现代图形加速器采用了边缘内并行模型来增强并行化，其性能显着优于传统处理器。然而，现有系统中对边缘的不加区别的处理会导致大量的计算冗余，从而对整体效率产生负面影响。本文介绍了 PRAGA，这是一种创新的图形加速器，旨在通过选择性地处理对最终结果有显着贡献的边缘来优化效率，同时保持高计算并行性。 PRAGA 利用边缘内顺序模型，优先考虑边缘处理，以利用粗粒度顶点级并行性并最大限度地减少不必要的计算。它采用了热值管理器来缓解片上网络拥塞，并采用内存感知聚结器来最大限度地减少冗余数据访问。我们使用 Xilinx Alveo U280 FPGA 加速器卡获得的实验结果表明，PRAGA 比最先进的加速器 ScalaGraph 和 GraphDyns 分别实现了 17.88 倍和 5.86 倍的加速，并且平均比基于 GPU 的先进系统 Gunrock 提高了 22.52 倍。这一重大改进凸显了 PRAGA 重新定义图形处理性能基准的潜力。

papers.title: RACER: Avoiding End-to-End Slowdowns in Accelerated Chip Multi-Processors.
papers.abstract: Recent chip multiprocessors incorporate several on-chip accelerators, marking the beginning of the Accelerated Chip Multi-Processor (XMP) era in datacenters. Despite the close proximity of accelerators and general-purpose cores, offloading functions to accelerators may not always be beneficial. Offloading to hardware accelerators can introduce several end-to-end overheads that can negate the speedup of the accelerable function. In this article, we design RACER, a hardware architecture and runtime system that evades the danger of end-to-end slowdowns when using hardware acceleration. RACER leverages a low-overhead interface between general-purpose cores and on-chip accelerators, fine-grained context switching, accelerator-initiated preemption, and seamless data motion between general-purpose cores and accelerators to improve the performance of workloads that use on-chip accelerators. We evaluate RACER on five representative request processing workloads featuring diverse memory access patterns, accelerable functions, and compute intensities. RACER improves the performance of hardware acceleration on a real XMP by an average of 1.31× on a range of diverse workloads and guarantees that accelerator offloads never cause slowdowns.
papers.abstract_zh: 最新的芯片多处理器集成了多个片上加速器，标志着数据中心加速芯片多处理器 (XMP) 时代的开始。尽管加速器和通用内核非常接近，但将功能卸载到加速器可能并不总是有益的。卸载到硬件加速器可能会带来一些端到端的开销，从而抵消加速功能的加速。在本文中，我们设计了 RACER，这是一种硬件架构和运行时系统，可以避免使用硬件加速时出现端到端减速的危险。 RACER 利用通用内核和片上加速器之间的低开销接口、细粒度上下文切换、加速器发起的抢占以及通用内核和加速器之间的无缝数据移动来提高使用片上加速器的工作负载的性能。我们在五个具有代表性的请求处理工作负载上评估 RACER，这些工作负载具有不同的内存访问模式、加速功能和计算强度。 RACER 在各种不同的工作负载上将真实 XMP 上的硬件加速性能平均提高了 1.31 倍，并保证加速器卸载永远不会导致速度下降。

papers.title: RaNAS: Resource-Aware Neural Architecture Search for Edge Computing.
papers.abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) for edge devices is often time-consuming because of long-latency deploying and testing on edge devices. The ability to accurately predict the computation cost and memory requirement for convolutional neural networks (CNNs) in advance holds substantial value. Existing work primarily relies on analytical models, which can result in high prediction errors. This article proposes a resource-aware NAS (RaNAS) model based on various features. Additionally, a new graph neural network is introduced to predict inference latency and maximum memory requirements for CNNs on edge devices. Experimental results show that, within the error bound of ±1%, RaNAS achieves an accuracy improvement of approximately 8% for inference latency prediction and about 25% for maximum memory occupancy prediction over the state-of-the-art approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于边缘设备上的部署和测试延迟较长，边缘设备的神经架构搜索 (NAS) 通常非常耗时。提前准确预测卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的计算成本和内存需求的能力具有重大价值。现有的工作主要依赖于分析模型，这可能会导致较高的预测误差。本文提出了一种基于各种特征的资源感知NAS（RaNAS）模型。此外，还引入了新的图神经网络来预测边缘设备上 CNN 的推理延迟和最大内存需求。实验结果表明，在±1%的误差范围内，与最先进的方法相比，RaNAS的推理延迟预测精度提高了约8%，最大内存占用预测精度提高了约25%。

papers.title: RT-GNN: Accelerating Sparse Graph Neural Networks by Tensor-CUDA Kernel Fusion.
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved remarkable successes in various graph-based learning tasks, thanks to their ability to leverage advanced GPUs. However, GNNs currently face challenges arising from the concurrent use of advanced Tensor Cores (TCs) and CUDA Cores (CDs) in GPUs. These challenges are further exacerbated due to repeated, inefficient, and redundant aggregations in GNN that result from the high sparsity and irregular non-zero distribution of real-world graphs. We propose RT-GNN, a GNN framework based on the fusion of advanced TC and CD units, to eliminate the aforementioned redundancies by exploiting the properties of an adjacency matrix. First, a novel GNN representation technique, hierarchical embedding graph (HEG) is proposed to manage the intermediate aggregation results hierarchically, which can further avoid redundancy in intermediate aggregations elegantly. Next, to address the inherent sparsity of graphs, RT-GNN places the blocks (a.k.a. tiles) in HEG onto TCs and CDs according to their sparsity by a new block-based row-wise multiplication approach, which assembles TCs and CDs to work concurrently. Experimental results demonstrate that HEG outperforms HAG by an average speedup of 19.3× for redundancy elimination performance, especially up to 72× speedup on the dataset of ARXIV. Moreover, for overall performance, RT-GNN outperforms state-of-the-art GNN frameworks (including DGL, HAG, GNNAdvisor, and TC-GNN) by an average factor of 3.1× while maintaining or even improving the task accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于能够利用先进的 GPU，图神经网络 (GNN) 在各种基于图的学​​习任务中取得了显着的成功。然而，GNN 目前面临着在 GPU 中同时使用高级 Tensor Core（TC）和 CUDA Core（CD）所带来的挑战。由于现实世界图的高度稀疏性和不规则的非零分布导致 GNN 中重复、低效和冗余的聚合，这些挑战进一步加剧。我们提出了 RT-GNN，一种基于先进 TC 和 CD 单元融合的 GNN 框架，通过利用邻接矩阵的特性来消除上述冗余。首先，提出了一种新颖的 GNN 表示技术——分层嵌入图（HEG）来分层管理中间聚合结果，可以进一步优雅地避免中间聚合中的冗余。接下来，为了解决图固有的稀疏性，RT-GNN 通过一种新的基于块的行乘法方法，根据稀疏性将 HEG 中的块（又名图块）放置到 TC 和 CD 上，该方法将 TC 和 CD 组合起来同时工作。实验结果表明，HEG 的冗余消除性能比 HAG 平均加速 19.3 倍，特别是在 ARXIV 数据集上加速高达 72 倍。此外，就整体性能而言，RT-GNN 的性能平均优于最先进的 GNN 框架（包括 DGL、HAG、GNNAdvisor 和 TC-GNN）3.1 倍，同时保持甚至提高了任务准确性。

papers.title: SampDedup: Sampling Prediction for Efficient Inline Data Deduplication on Non-volatile Memory.
papers.abstract: Data deduplication is an effective technique for reducing redundant data storage space in various storage systems. Generally, deduplication consists of four steps: chunking, fingerprinting, fingerprint lookup, and data management. Recently, Non-volatile Memory (NVM) as an emerging storage device has received widespread attention. Directly applying the deduplication technique on NVM for storage cost savings faces many challenges: (a) deduplication on NVM devices suffers from computation bottleneck instead of the I/O bottleneck faced by deduplication on traditional storage devices (such as HDD and SSD); (b) new fingerprint indexes and metadata are required to be re-designed to adapt to NVM characteristics; (c) inline deduplication on NVM is more sensitive to the latency. To solve these challenges, we propose a novel Samp ling prediction-based inline data Dedup lication method ( SampDedup ) on NVM devices. It aims to ensure high deduplication ratios while reducing computation costs and latency by optimizing data chunking , fingerprinting , and fingerprint lookup . (a) For data chunking , a sampling prediction-based chunking method ( SampChunk ) is proposed to leverage chunk similarity to distinguish duplicate chunks and skip them for chunking. This method can be easily integrated into most sliding-window based and non-window based CDC chunking algorithms. (b) For fingerprinting , the commonly used SHA-1 algorithm is further optimized to reduce the extra computational overhead introduced by SampChunk, and an asynchronous fingerprinting method is proposed to reduce the fingerprinting latency of unique chunks. (c) For fingerprint lookup , we design a header fingerprint index and metadata table for each data chunk constructed by SampChunk on NVM, and we use a fast-read buffer to replace the traditional slow LRU cache to improve search efficiency. Experiments on four real-world datasets demonstrate that SampDedup consistently presents high inline data deduplication ratios on NVM with different workloads and data partitioning algorithms while saving more than 90% chunking time compared with state-of-the-art deduplication baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 重复数据删除是减少各种存储系统中冗余数据存储空间的有效技术。一般来说，重复数据删除包括四个步骤：分块、指纹识别、指纹查找和数据管理。近年来，非易失性存储器（NVM）作为一种新兴的存储设备受到了广泛的关注。直接在NVM上应用重复数据删除技术来节省存储成本面临着许多挑战：（a）NVM设备上的重复数据删除面临计算瓶颈，而不是传统存储设备（例如HDD和SSD）上的重复数据删除面临I/O瓶颈； (b) 需要重新设计新的指纹索引和元数据以适应NVM特性； (c) NVM 上的内联重复数据删除对延迟更敏感。为了解决这些挑战，我们在 NVM 设备上提出了一种新颖的基于采样预测的内联重复数据删除方法（SampDedup）。它旨在通过优化数据分块、指纹识别和指纹查找来确保高重复数据删除率，同时降低计算成本和延迟。 （a）对于数据分块，提出了一种基于采样预测的分块方法（SampChunk），利用块相似性来区分重复块并跳过它们进行分块。该方法可以轻松集成到大多数基于滑动窗口和基于非窗口的 CDC 分块算法中。 (b)对于指纹识别，进一步优化常用的SHA-1算法以减少SampChunk引入的额外计算开销，并提出异步指纹识别方法以减少唯一块的指纹识别延迟。 (c)对于指纹查找，我们为NVM上的SampChunk构建的每个数据块设计了头指纹索引和元数据表，并使用快速读取缓冲区代替传统的慢速LRU缓存以提高搜索效率。对四个真实数据集的实验表明，SampDedup 在具有不同工作负载和数据分区算法的 NVM 上始终呈现出较高的内联重复数据删除率，同时与最先进的重复数据删除基准相比，节省了 90% 以上的分块时间。

papers.title: ScaWL: Scaling k-WL (Weisfeiler-Lehman) Algorithms in Memory and Performance on Shared and Distributed-Memory Systems.
papers.abstract: The k -dimensional Weisfeiler-Lehman ( k -WL) algorithm—developed as an efficient heuristic for testing if two graphs are isomorphic—is a fundamental kernel for node embedding in the emerging field of graph neural networks. Unfortunately, the k -WL algorithm has exponential storage requirements, limiting the size of graphs that can be handled. This work presents a novel k -WL scheme with a storage requirement orders of magnitude lower while maintaining the same accuracy as the original k -WL algorithm. Due to the reduced storage requirement, our scheme allows for processing much bigger graphs than previously possible on a single compute node. For even bigger graphs, we provide the first distributed-memory implementation. Our k -WL scheme also has significantly reduced communication volume and offers high scalability. Our experimental results demonstrate that our approach is significantly faster and has superior scalability compared to five other implementations employing state-of-the-art techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: k 维 Weisfeiler-Lehman ( k -WL) 算法是作为测试两个图是否同构的有效启发式算法而开发的，是图神经网络新兴领域中节点嵌入的基本内核。不幸的是，k -WL 算法具有指数存储要求，限制了可以处理的图的大小。这项工作提出了一种新颖的 k -WL 方案，其存储需求降低了几个数量级，同时保持与原始 k -WL 算法相同的精度。由于存储需求减少，我们的方案允许在单个计算节点上处理比以前更大的图。对于更大的图，我们提供第一个分布式内存实现。我们的 k -WL 方案还显着减少了通信量并提供了高可扩展性。我们的实验结果表明，与采用最先进技术的其他五种实现相比，我们的方法速度明显更快，并且具有卓越的可扩展性。

papers.title: Scheduling Language Chronology: Past, Present, and Future.
papers.abstract: Scheduling languages express to a compiler—or equivalently, a code generator—a sequence of optimizations to apply. Performance tools that support a scheduling language interface allow exploration of optimizations, i.e., exploratory compilers . While scheduling languages have become a common feature of tools for experts, the proliferation of these languages without unifying common features may be confusing to users. Moreover, we recognize a need to organize the compiler developer community around common exploratory compiler infrastructure, and future advances to address, for example, data layout and data movement. To support a broader set of users may require raising the level of abstraction. This article provides a chronology of scheduling languages, discussing their origins in iterative compilation and autotuning, noting the common features that are used in existing frameworks, and calling for changes to increase their utility and portability.
papers.abstract_zh: 调度语言向编译器（或等效的代码生成器）表达要应用的一系列优化。支持调度语言接口的性能工具允许探索优化，即探索性编译器。虽然调度语言已成为专家工具的通用功能，但这些语言的激增而没有统一通用功能可能会让用户感到困惑。此外，我们认识到需要围绕通用的探索性编译器基础设施和未来的进步来组织编译器开发人员社区，例如数据布局和数据移动。为了支持更广泛的用户可能需要提高抽象级别。本文提供了调度语言的年表，讨论了它们在迭代编译和自动调优中的起源，指出了现有框架中使用的常见功能，并呼吁进行更改以提高其实用性和可移植性。

papers.title: SEED: Speculative Security Metadata Updates for Low-Latency Secure Memory.
papers.abstract: Securing systems’ main memory is important for building trusted data centers. To ensure memory security, encryption and integrity verification techniques update the security metadata (e.g., encryption counters and integrity trees) during memory data writes. Existing studies are optimistic about the effect of data writes on system performance since they regard all data writes as background operations. However, we show that security metadata updates significantly increase data write latency. High-latency data writes frequently fill up write buffers in the system, forcing the system to perform the writes in the critical path. As a result, performance-critical data reads need to wait for the execution of these writes, which increases data read latency and degrades system performance. In this article, we propose SEED that improves the performance of secure memory systems by speculatively updating security metadata in the background before data writes arrive. To enable speculative updates, SEED predicts which dirty cache lines will be written to memory through natural evictions. We find that cache evictions depend on multiple factors. To decouple the dependencies for accurate predictions, we devise a two-step eviction prediction method based on our observation that the next eviction victim rarely changes in a set. The first step predicts which cache sets will evict cache lines, whereas the second step predicts which cache lines will be evicted by finding the next eviction victims in the sets. For predicted evictions, we develop a speculative updater to perform speculative updates. We analyze the invariants that must be followed by the updater to ensure the correctness of speculative updates. The updater rolls back the speculatively updated security metadata of inaccurate predictions. To reduce the rollback overhead, we devise a rollback batching and an update pausing optimization for the updater. Experimental results show that SEED reduces data write latency by 39.8%, data read latency by 44.9%, and improves performance by 40.0% on average compared with the state-of-the-art secure memory design.
papers.abstract_zh: 保护系统主内存的安全对于构建可信数据中心非常重要。为了确保内存安全，加密和完整性验证技术会在内存数据写入期间更新安全元数据（例如加密计数器和完整性树）。现有研究对数据写入对系统性能的影响持乐观态度，因为他们将所有数据写入视为后台操作。然而，我们发现安全元数据更新会显着增加数据写入延迟。高延迟的数据写入经常会填满系统中的写入缓冲区，迫使系统在关键路径上执行写入。因此，对性能至关重要的数据读取需要等待这些写入的执行，这会增加数据读取延迟并降低系统性能。在本文中，我们提出了 SEED，它通过在数据写入到达之前在后台推测性地更新安全元数据来提高安全内存系统的性能。为了启用推测性更新，SEED 会预测哪些脏缓存行将通过自然驱逐写入内存。我们发现缓存驱逐取决于多种因素。为了解耦准确预测的依赖关系，我们根据我们的观察设计了一种两步驱逐预测方法，即下一个驱逐受害者在一组中很少发生变化。第一步预测哪些缓存集将驱逐缓存行，而第二步通过查找集合中的下一个驱逐受害者来预测哪些缓存行将被驱逐。对于预测的驱逐，我们开发了一个推测性更新程序来执行推测性更新。我们分析更新程序必须遵循的不变量，以确保推测更新的正确性。更新程序回滚不准确预测的推测性更新的安全元数据。为了减少回滚开销，我们为更新程序设计了回滚批处理和更新暂停优化。实验结果表明，与最先进的安全内存设计相比，SEED 的数据写入延迟降低了 39.8%，数据读取延迟降低了 44.9%，性能平均提高了 40.0%。

papers.title: ShieldCXL: A Practical Obliviousness Support with Sealed CXL Memory.
papers.abstract: The CXL (Compute Express Link) technology is an emerging memory interface with high-level commands. Recent studies applied the CXL memory expanding technique to mitigate the capacity limitation of the conventional DDRx memory. Unlike the prior studies to use the CXL memory as the capacity expander, this study proposes to use the CXL-based memory as a secure main memory device, while removing the conventional memory. In the conventional DDRx memory, to provide confidentiality, integrity, replay protection, and obliviousness, costly mechanisms such as counter-based integrity trees and location shuffling by ORAM (Oblivious RAM) are used. Such mechanisms incur significant performance degradation in the current DDR-based memory systems, and their costs increase as the capacity of the memory increases. To mitigate the performance degradation, the prior work proposed an obfuscated channel for a secure memory module enclosing its controller in the package. Based on the approach, we propose a secure CXL-only memory architecture called ShieldCXL . It uses the channel encryption and integrity protection mechanism of the CXL interface to provide a practical ORAM while supporting confidentiality, integrity, and replay protection from physical attacks and rowhammers. To protect the PCIe-connected memory expanding board, this study proposes to use the standard physical sealing technique to detect physical intrusion. To mitigate the increased latency with the sealed CXL memory module, the study further optimizes performance by adopting an in-package DRAM cache. In addition, this study investigates destination obfuscation when a CXL switch is used to route among multiple hosts and memory devices. The evaluation shows that ShieldCXL provides 9.16x performance improvements over the prior ORAM technique.
papers.abstract_zh: CXL（Compute Express Link）技术是一种新兴的具有高级命令的存储器接口。最近的研究应用了CXL内存扩展技术来缓解传统DDRx内存的容量限制。与之前使用CXL存储器作为容量扩展器的研究不同，本研究提出使用基于CXL的存储器作为安全主存储设备，同时去除传统存储器。在传统的 DDRx 存储器中，为了提供机密性、完整性、重放保护和遗忘性，使用了昂贵的机制，例如基于计数器的完整性树和 ORAM (Oblivious RAM) 的位置改组。这种机制在当前基于DDR的存储器系统中导致显着的性能下降，并且它们的成本随着存储器容量的增加而增加。为了减轻性能下降，先前的工作提出了一种用于将其控制器封装在封装中的安全内存模块的模糊通道。基于该方法，我们提出了一种名为 ShieldCXL 的安全 CXL 内存架构。它使用CXL接口的通道加密和完整性保护机制来提供实用的ORAM，同时支持针对物理攻击和行锤的机密性、完整性和重放保护。为了保护PCIe连接的内存扩展板，本研究提出使用标准物理密封技术来检测物理入侵。为了缓解密封 CXL 内存模块增加的延迟，该研究通过采用封装内 DRAM 缓存进一步优化性能。此外，本研究还研究了使用 CXL 交换机在多个主机和内存设备之间进行路由时的目的地混淆。评估表明，ShieldCXL 的性能比之前的 ORAM 技术提高了 9.16 倍。

papers.title: Shift-CIM: In-SRAM Alignment To Support General-Purpose Bit-level Sparsity Exploration in SRAM Multiplication.
papers.abstract: Multiplication plays a critical role in SRAM-based Computing-in-Memory (CIM) architectures. However, current SRAM-based CIMs face three major limitations. First, they do not fully exploit bit-level sparsity, resulting in unnecessary overhead in both latency and energy consumption. Second, the generation of numerous zero-dot products is superfluous. Third, the irregular organization of SRAM complicates the implementation. To address these issues, we propose Shift-CIM, a general-purpose approach that fully leverages bit-level sparsity within SRAM-based multiplications. Shift-CIM aligns the multipliers within the SRAM array, accumulating only the required dot products based on the non-zero bits of the multipliers. Shift-CIM achieves a regular SRAM organization by assembling two irregular SRAM arrays in a transposed manner. Our evaluations show that Shift-CIM is highly efficient, operating at a supply voltage of 0.9 V and a frequency of 833 MHz, while incurring only a 4.8% area overhead. Despite these modest requirements, Shift-CIM significantly accelerates multiplication operations, achieving up to 3.08× the performance improvement and a 60% reduction in energy consumption compared to state-of-the-art designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 乘法在基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (CIM) 架构中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，当前基于 SRAM 的 CIM 面临三个主要限制。首先，它们没有充分利用位级稀疏性，导致延迟和能耗方面产生不必要的开销。其次，大量零点产品的产生是多余的。第三，SRAM的组织不规范，使实施变得复杂。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Shift-CIM，这是一种通用方法，可以充分利用基于 SRAM 的乘法中的位级稀疏性。 Shift-CIM 对齐 SRAM 阵列内的乘法器，仅根据乘法器的非零位累加所需的点积。 Shift-CIM通过将两个不规则的SRAM阵列以转置的方式组装起来，实现了规则的SRAM组织。我们的评估表明，Shift-CIM 效率很高，工作电压为 0.9 V，频率为 833 MHz，而面积开销仅为 4.8%。尽管要求不高，但 Shift-CIM 仍显着加速了乘法运算，与最先进的设计相比，性能提高了 3.08 倍，能耗降低了 60%。

papers.title: Shining Light on the Inter-procedural Code Obfuscation: Keep Pace with Progress in Binary Diffing.
papers.abstract: Software obfuscation techniques have lost their effectiveness due to the rapid development of binary diffing techniques, which can achieve accurate function matching and identification. In this paper, we propose a new inter-procedural code obfuscation mechanism KHaos , 1 which moves the code across functions to obfuscate the function by using compilation optimizations. Three obfuscation primitives are proposed to separate, aggregate, and hide the function. They can be combined to enhance the obfuscation effect further. This article also reveals distinguishing factors on obfuscation and compiler optimization and presents novel observations to gain insights into the impact of actively utilizing compiler optimization in obfuscation. A prototype of KHaos is implemented and evaluated on a large number of real-world programs. Experimental results show that KHaos outperforms existing code obfuscations and can significantly reduce the accuracy rates of six state-of-the-art binary diffing techniques with lower runtime overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于二进制差异技术的快速发展，可以实现精确的功能匹配和识别，软件混淆技术已经失去了有效性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的过程间代码混淆机制 KHaos，1，它跨函数移动代码，通过使用编译优化来混淆函数。提出了三种混淆原语来分离、聚合和隐藏函数。它们可以组合起来进一步增强混淆效果。本文还揭示了混淆和编译器优化的区别因素，并提出了新颖的观察结果，以深入了解在混淆中积极利用编译器优化的影响。 KHaos 的原型已在大量实际程序中实施和评估。实验结果表明，KHaos 的性能优于现有的代码混淆，并且可以显着降低六种最先进的二进制比较技术的准确率，同时运行时开销较低。

papers.title: ShuffleInfer: Disaggregate LLM Inference for Mixed Downstream Workloads.
papers.abstract: Transformer-based large language model (LLM) inference serving is now the backbone of many cloud services. LLM inference consists of a prefill phase and a decode phase. However, existing LLM deployment practices often overlook the distinct characteristics of these phases, leading to significant interference. To mitigate interference, our insight is to carefully schedule and group inference requests based on their characteristics. We realize this idea in ShuffleInfer through three pillars. First, it partitions prompts into fixed-size chunks so that the accelerator always runs close to its computation-saturated limit. Second, it disaggregates prefill and decode instances so each can run independently. Finally, it uses a smart two-level scheduling algorithm augmented with predicted resource usage to avoid decode scheduling hotspots. Results show that ShuffleInfer improves time-to-first-token (TTFT), job completion time (JCT), and inference efficiency in terms of performance per dollar by a large margin, e.g., it uses 38% less resources all the while lowering average TTFT and average JCT by 97% and 47%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理服务现已成为许多云服务的支柱。 LLM 推理由预填充阶段和解码阶段组成。然而，现有的法学硕士部署实践常常忽视这些阶段的独特特征，从而导致严重的干扰。为了减轻干扰，我们的见解是根据推理请求的特征仔细安排和分组。我们在 ShuffleInfer 中通过三个支柱来实现这个想法。首先，它将提示划分为固定大小的块，以便加速器始终在接近其计算饱和限制的情况下运行。其次，它分解预填充和解码实例，以便每个实例都可以独立运行。最后，它使用智能两级调度算法，并增加了预测资源使用情况，以避免解码调度热点。结果表明，ShuffleInfer 在每美元性能方面大幅提高了首次令牌时间 (TTFT)、作业完成时间 (JCT) 和推理效率，例如，它使用的资源始终减少了 38%，同时将平均 TTFT 和平均 JCT 分别降低了 97% 和 47%。

papers.title: SimTrace: Exploiting Spatial and Temporal Sampling for Large-Scale Performance Analysis.
papers.abstract: MPI tracing tools is essential to collect the communication events and performance metrics of large-scale programs for further performance analysis and optimization. However, toward the exascale era, the performance and storage overhead for tracing becomes extremely prohibitive that significantly disturbs the original execution of MPI programs, leading to distorted tracing data and thus mislead analysis results. Although process sampling can effectively reduce the tracing overhead, it can easily miss important execution information that is necessary for subsequent performance analysis. In this article, we propose SimTrace , a scalable MPI tracing tool with novel spatial and temporal sampling strategies that exploits the similarity among MPI processes to achieve both low tracing overhead as well as obtain sufficient tracing information. The experimental results demonstrate that SimTrace can significantly reduce the MPI tracing overhead compared to the state-of-the-art tracing tools, meanwhile enabling effective analysis to guide performance optimization of large-scale programs.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 跟踪工具对于收集大型程序的通信事件和性能指标以进行进一步的性能分析和优化至关重要。然而，到了百亿亿次时代，追踪的性能和存储开销变得极其高昂，严重扰乱了MPI程序的原始执行，导致追踪数据失真，从而误导分析结果。虽然进程采样可以有效减少跟踪开销，但很容易错过后续性能分析所需的重要执行信息。在本文中，我们提出了 SimTrace，这是一种可扩展的 MPI 跟踪工具，具有新颖的空间和时间采样策略，利用 MPI 进程之间的相似性来实现低跟踪开销并获得足够的跟踪信息。实验结果表明，与最先进的跟踪工具相比，SimTrace 可以显着降低 MPI 跟踪开销，同时能够进行有效分析以指导大型程序的性能优化。

papers.title: SnsBooster: Enhancing Sampling-based μArch Evaluation Efficiency through Online Performance Sensitivity Analysis.
papers.abstract: Sampling-based methods, such as SimPoint, are widely used for efficient pre-silicon μ Arch evaluations, where the costs are the number of simulation points multiplied by the number of evaluated μ Arch designs. However, these costs keep growing with an increasing number of simulation points and expanding μ Arch design space. Although techniques have been developed to accelerate the μ Arch design space exploration, less attention has been given to further reducing the simulation budget of each μ Arch evaluation. Common strategies like reducing simulation coverage or sampling fewer simulation points typically compromise estimation accuracy. Therefore, further reducing the simulation budget without compromising estimation accuracy remains a critical research problem. In this work, we propose SnsBooster to enhance sampling-based μ Arch evaluation efficiency, based on two insights: (a) large portions of simulation points’ performance changes are typically insensitive to the evaluated μ Arch changes, and (b) simulation points’ performance sensitivities under specific μ Arch change correlate with their inherent characteristics. By online building a μ Arch-specific performance sensitivity classifier via progressive simulation and continuous validation, SnsBooster can identify and selectively evaluate only performance-sensitive points, thus reducing the simulation budget without compromising estimation accuracy. When applied across various μ Arch changes, SnsBooster achieves an average simulation budget reduction of 39.04% with an accuracy loss of only 0.14%, compared to simulating all the sampled points. Under the same accuracy loss, SnsBooster’s simulation budgets are only 64.73% and 65.60% of those required by methods of reducing simulation coverage or sampling fewer points. Besides, under identical simulation budgets, the average accuracy losses of these methods are 1.41% and 1.23%, which is substantially higher than that of SnsBooster.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于采样的方法（例如 SimPoint）广泛用于高效的投片前 μ Arch 评估，其成本是模拟点的数量乘以评估的 μ Arch 设计的数量。然而，随着模拟点数量的增加和 μ Arch 设计空间的扩大，这些成本不断增加。尽管已经开发出加速μArch设计空间探索的技术，但对进一步减少每个μArch评估的模拟预算的关注较少。减少模拟覆盖范围或采样更少的模拟点等常见策略通常会影响估计精度。因此，在不影响估计精度的情况下进一步减少模拟预算仍然是一个关键的研究问题。在这项工作中，我们提出 SnsBooster 来提高基于采样的 μ Arch 评估效率，基于两个见解：（a）大部分模拟点的性能变化通常对评估的 μ Arch 变化不敏感，（b）特定 μ Arch 变化下的模拟点性能敏感性与其固有特征相关。通过渐进式仿真和持续验证在线构建 μArch 特定的性能敏感度分类器，SnsBooster 可以识别并选择性地仅评估性能敏感点，从而在不影响估计精度的情况下减少仿真预算。当应用于各种 μ Arch 变化时，与模拟所有采样点相比，SnsBooster 的平均模拟预算减少了 39.04%，精度损失仅为 0.14%。在同样的精度损失下，SnsBooster的仿真预算仅为减少仿真覆盖率或采样更少点的方法所需仿真预算的64.73%和65.60%。此外，在相同的仿真预算下，这些方法的平均精度损失分别为1.41%和1.23%，明显高于SnsBooster。

papers.title: SPIRIT: Scalable and Persistent In-Memory Indices for Real-Time Search.
papers.abstract: Today, real-time search over big microblogging data requires low indexing and query latency. Online services, therefore, prefer to host inverted indices in memory. Unfortunately, as datasets grow, indices grow proportionally, and with limited DRAM scaling, the main memory faces high pressure. Also, indices must be persisted on disks as building them is computationally intensive. Consequently, it becomes necessary to frequently move on-heap index segments to storage, slowing down indexing. Reading storage-resident index segments requires filesystem calls and disk accesses during query evaluation, leading to high and unpredictable tail latency. This work exploits hybrid DRAM and scalable non-volatile memory (NVM) to offer dynamically growing and instantly searchable (i.e., real-time) persistent indices in on-heap memory. We implement SPIRIT, a real-time text inversion engine over hybrid memory. SPIRIT exploits the byte-addressability of hybrid memory to enable direct access to the index on a pre-allocated heap, eliminating expensive block storage accesses and filesystem calls during live operation. It uses an in-memory segment descriptor table to offer: ➊ instant segment availability to query evaluators upon fresh ingestion, ➋ low-overhead segment movement across memory tiers transparent to query evaluators, and ➌ decoupled segment movement into NVM from their visibility to query evaluators, enabling different policies for mitigating NVM latency. SPIRIT accelerates compaction with zero-copy merging. It supports volatile, graceful shutdown, and crash-consistent indexing modes. The latter two modes offer instant recovery using persistent pointers. SPIRIT with hybrid memory and strong crash consistency guarantees exhibits many orders of magnitude better tail response times and query throughout than the state-of-the-art Lucene search engine. Compared against a highly optimized non-real-time evaluation of Lucene with liberal DRAM size, on average, across six query workloads, SPIRIT still delivers 2.5× better (real-time) query throughput. Our work applies to other services that will benefit from direct on-heap access to large persistent indices.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，对微博大数据的实时搜索需要较低的索引和查询延迟。因此，在线服务更喜欢在内存中托管倒排索引。不幸的是，随着数据集的增长，索引也会成比例增长，并且由于 DRAM 扩展有限，主内存面临着高压。此外，索引必须持久保存在磁盘上，因为构建索引需要大量计算。因此，有必要频繁地将堆上索引段移动到存储，从而减慢索引速度。读取存储驻留索引段需要在查询评估期间进行文件系统调用和磁盘访问，从而导致高且不可预测的尾部延迟。这项工作利用混合 DRAM 和可扩展非易失性存储器 (NVM) 在堆内存中提供动态增长且可立即搜索（即实时）的持久索引。我们实现了 SPIRIT，一种基于混合内存的实时文本反转引擎。 SPIRIT 利用混合内存的字节寻址能力来实现对预分配堆上索引的直接访问，从而消除实时操作期间昂贵的块存储访问和文件系统调用。它使用内存中段描述符表来提供： ➊ 在新摄取时查询评估器的即时段可用性， ➋ 对查询评估器透明的跨内存层的低开销段移动，以及 ➌ 将段移动到 NVM 与查询评估器的可见性分离，从而启用不同的策略来减轻 NVM 延迟。 SPIRIT 通过零拷贝合并加速压缩。它支持易失性、正常关闭和崩溃一致索引模式。后两种模式使用持久指针提供即时恢复。 SPIRIT 具有混合内存和强大的崩溃一致性保证，与最先进的 Lucene 搜索引擎相比，尾部响应时间和查询吞吐量要好很多数量级。与具有自由 DRAM 大小的高度优化的 Lucene 非实时评估相比，平均而言，在六个查询工作负载中，SPIRIT 仍然提供 2.5 倍更好的（实时）查询吞吐量。我们的工作适用于其他服务，这些服务将受益于对大型持久索引的直接堆访问。

papers.title: SpMARD: A Sparse-Sparse Matrix Multiplication Accelerator with Reconfigurable Dataflow for DNN Workloads.
papers.abstract: Deep learning becomes increasingly popular, and its main workload is Sparse-Sparse Matrix Multiplication (SpMSpM). Most SpMSpM accelerators usually only support a single dataflow. Different dataflows have different performance in different computing environments. Therefore, the single-dataflow accelerator cannot maintain the highest performance in all environments. Compared with single-dataflow accelerators, multi-dataflow accelerators provide flexible options for different workloads and improve the overall performance. Flexagon, Sparm, and SPADA are state-of-the-art multi-dataflow accelerators. However, the computation process of Flexagon and Sparm is not fully pipelined, and SPADA cannot support inner product dataflow. Additionally, Flexagon, Sparm, and SPADA cannot switch dataflows quickly and accurately. Inspired by these observations, we present SpMARD, a SpMSpM accelerator with reconfigurable dataflow. The computation process of SpMARD is fully pipelined, and SpMARD can support six dataflow variants simultaneously. Through the design of a Two-stage Pipeline Adder Network (TPAN) and a Position-based Psum Array (PPA), SpMARD can execute element-level merging, which can hide the merging overhead. Through the quantitative analysis of dataflows, we implement a Dataflow Switcher (DSwitcher), which can switch dataflows more efficiently. For the SpMSpM workload, the performance (GOPS) of the SpMARD we proposed is 1.27 times that of Flexagon, 1.18 times that of Sparm, and 1.22 times that of SPADA.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习越来越流行，其主要工作量是稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法（SpMSpM）。大多数 SpMSpM 加速器通常仅支持单个数据流。不同的数据流在不同的计算环境中具有不同的性能。因此，单数据流加速器无法在所有环境下保持最高性能。与单数据流加速器相比，多数据流加速器为不同的工作负载提供了灵活的选择，提高了整体性能。 Flexagon、Sparm 和 SPADA 是最先进的多数据流加速器。然而，Flexagon和Sparm的计算过程并不是完全流水线化的，并且SPADA不能支持内积数据流。此外，Flexagon、Sparm和SPADA无法快速准确地切换数据流。受这些观察的启发，我们推出了 SpMARD，这是一种具有可重新配置数据流的 SpMSpM 加速器。 SpMARD的计算过程是完全流水线化的，SpMARD可以同时支持六种数据流变体。通过两级管道加法器网络（TPAN）和基于位置的Psum阵列（PPA）的设计，SpMARD可以执行元素级合并，这可以隐藏合并开销。通过对数据流的定量分析，我们实现了一个数据流切换器（DSwitcher），它可以更高效地切换数据流。对于SpMSpM工作负载，我们提出的SpMARD的性能（GOPS）是Flexagon的1.27倍，Sparm的1.18倍，SPADA的1.22倍。

papers.title: SRSparse: Generating Codes for High-Performance Sparse Matrix-Vector Semiring Computations.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector semiring computation is a key operation in sparse matrix computations, with performance strongly dependent on both program design and the features of the sparse matrices. Given the diversity of sparse matrices, designing a tailored program for each matrix is challenging. To address this, we propose SRSparse, 1 a program generator that creates tailored programs by automatically combining program designing methods to fit specific input matrices. It provides two components: the problem definition configuration , which declares the computation, and the scheduling language , which can be leveraged by an auto-tuner to specify the program designs. The two are lowered to the intermediate representations of SRSparse, the Format IR and Kernel IR , which respectively generate format conversion routine and kernel code. We evaluate SRSparse on four representative sparse kernels and three format conversion routines. For sparse kernels, SRSparse achieves median speedups over handwritten programs: COO (3.50×), CSR-Adaptive (5.36×), CSR5 (2.06×), ELL (1.63×), Gunrock (1.57×), and GraphBLAST (1.96×); over an auto-tuner: AlphaSparse (1.16×); and over a compiler: TACO (1.71×). For format conversion routines, SRSparse achieves median speedups over handwritten implementations: Intel MKL (7.60×), SPARSKIT (2.61×), CUSP (2.77×), and Ginkgo (1.74×); and over a compiler: TACO (4.04×).
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量半环计算是稀疏矩阵计算中的关键运算，其性能强烈依赖于程序设计和稀疏矩阵的特征。考虑到稀疏矩阵的多样性，为每个矩阵设计定制程序具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 SRSparse，1 一种程序生成器，它通过自动组合程序设计方法来创建定制程序以适应特定的输入矩阵。它提供两个组件：问题定义配置（声明计算）和调度语言（自动调优器可以利用它来指定程序设计）。两者被降级为SRSparse的中间表示，Format IR和Kernel IR，它们分别生成格式转换例程和内核代码。我们在四个代表性稀疏内核和三个格式转换例程上评估 SRSparse。对于稀疏内核，SRSparse 比手写程序实现了平均加速：COO (3.50×)、CSR-Adaptive (5.36×)、CSR5 (2.06×)、ELL (1.63×)、Gunrock (1.57×) 和 GraphBLAST (1.96×)；通过自动调谐器：AlphaSparse (1.16×)；并通过编译器：TACO (1.71×)。对于格式转换例程，SRSparse 比手写实现实现了平均加速：Intel MKL (7.60×)、SPARSKIT (2.61×)、CUSP (2.77×) 和 Ginkgo (1.74×)；并通过编译器：TACO (4.04×)。

papers.title: Steered Bubble: An Interposer-based Deadlock Recovery Algorithm for Multi-chiplet Systems.
papers.abstract: Dividing a single System-on-Chip (SoC) into multiple chiplets and integrating them via an interposer can achieve an optimal balance between continuous transistor integration and monetary cost. However, potential deadlock may arise between the chiplets and the interposer. This deadlock can be avoided by applying turn restriction or injection control on the boundary routers, at the cost of additional latency and suboptimal performance. Compared to deadlock avoidance, deadlock recovery exerts less impact on network performance. Nevertheless, accurate and timely deadlock detection, along with efficient deadlock recovery, continues to pose significant challenges. Additionally, modularity is a specific concern, which involves integrating chiplets of various functions, sizes, manufacturing processes, and so on. Minimizing the negative impact of deadlock resolution while maximizing modularity is crucial for achieving the benefit of chiplets. This article proposes a modular deadlock detection strategy, Up-Down, which monitors both the upward and downward directions of vertical channels, facilitating information exchange through the congestion-sense network. When a pair of blocked upward and downward vertical channels is detected simultaneously, it is considered that an inter-chiplet deadlock has occurred. This significantly enhances the accuracy of deadlock detection by two orders of magnitude compared to time-out deadlock detection. Furthermore, this article introduces Steered Bubble, a low-cost deadlock recovery algorithm. It does so by injecting bubbles into potential deadlock cycles identified by Up-Down. These bubbles follow preset paths, ensuring efficient deadlock recovery. Experimental results indicate that the Steered Bubble results in an average performance enhancement of 1% to 10% during full-system simulations, with an area overhead of less than 2%.
papers.abstract_zh: 将单个片上系统 (SoC) 划分为多个小芯片并通过中介层集成它们可以在连续晶体管集成和货币成本之间实现最佳平衡。然而，小芯片和中介层之间可能会出现潜在的死锁。通过在边界路由器上应用轮次限制或注入控制可以避免这种死锁，但代价是额外的延迟和次优性能。与死锁避免相比，死锁恢复对网络性能的影响较小。 Nevertheless, accurate and timely deadlock detection, along with efficient deadlock recovery, continues to pose significant challenges.此外，模块化是一个具体问题，涉及集成各种功能、尺寸、制造工艺等的小芯片。最大限度地减少死锁解决方案的负面影响，同时最大限度地提高模块化程度，对于实现小芯片的优势至关重要。本文提出了一种模块化的死锁检测策略Up-Down，该策略监视垂直通道的向上和向下方向，促进通过拥塞感知网络的信息交换。当同时检测到一对被阻塞的向上和向下垂直通道时，认为已经发生了小芯片间死锁。与超时死锁检测相比，这显着地将死锁检测的准确性提高了两个数量级。此外，本文还介绍了一种低成本的死锁恢复算法Steered Bubble。它通过向 Up-Down 识别的潜在死锁循环中注入气泡来实现这一点。这些气泡遵循预设路径，确保有效的死锁恢复。实验结果表明，在全系统仿真过程中，Steered Bubble 的平均性能提高了 1% 到 10%，而面积开销不到 2%。

papers.title: Supporting Dynamic Program Sizes in Deep Learning-Based Cost Models for Code Optimization.
papers.abstract: Automatic code optimization enables developers to write high-level code relying on compilers to optimize it and generate efficient code for target hardware. State-of-the-art methods for automatic code optimization leverage deep learning to build cost models that predict the impact of code optimizations on execution time. However, these models are typically limited in terms of the size and complexity of the programs they support. This research presents a novel approach to developing deep learning-based cost models that address these limitations. Our approach introduces a new program representation that efficiently represents programs with complex structures and large sizes such as varying loop depths, buffer numbers, and dimensions. Furthermore, we propose a novel deep learning architecture, that can handle this dynamic program representation. This allows the model to work on larger and more complex programs than those it was trained on. We implemented this model in Tiramisu, a state-of-the-art compiler. Our evaluation shows that our proposed model can generalize to programs larger than those seen during training, while the original Tiramisu cost model cannot. We also show that such generality does not lead to a significant increase in our proposed model’s Mean Absolute Percentage Error or a decrease in the quality of code optimizations found when the model is used for automatic code optimization. In contrast, our proposed model on average achieves a 41.89% improvement in speed compared to the original cost model when both models are trained on the same dataset, showing better generalization over unseen programs. This is a significant advantage over previous approaches, which typically do not support program sizes beyond those seen during the training.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动代码优化使开发人员能够编写高级代码，依靠编译器对其进行优化并为目标硬件生成高效的代码。最先进的自动代码优化方法利用深度学习来构建成本模型，预测代码优化对执行时间的影响。然而，这些模型通常受到它们支持的程序的大小和复杂性的限制。这项研究提出了一种开发基于深度学习的成本模型的新方法，以解决这些局限性。我们的方法引入了一种新的程序表示，可以有效地表示具有复杂结构和大尺寸的程序，例如不同的循环深度、缓冲区数量和维度。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习架构，可以处理这种动态程序表示。这使得模型能够处理比训练时更大、更复杂的程序。我们在最先进的编译器 Tiramisu 中实现了这个模型。我们的评估表明，我们提出的模型可以推广到比训练期间看到的程序更大的程序，而原始的提拉米苏成本模型则不能。我们还表明，这种通用性不会导致我们提出的模型的平均绝对百分比误差显着增加，也不会导致模型用于自动代码优化时发现的代码优化质量下降。相比之下，当两个模型在同一数据集上进行训练时，我们提出的模型与原始成本模型相比，平均速度提高了 41.89%，显示出对未见过的程序有更好的泛化能力。与以前的方法相比，这是一个显着的优势，以前的方法通常不支持超出培训期间看到的程序规模。

papers.title: Supports of Data Cache Division for Computational Solid-state Drives.
papers.abstract: The computational SSD ( CompSSD ), with high computing capabilities, can function not only as a storage device but also as a computing node. The data cache of the CompSSD device stores both the output data from host-side tasks and the input data for tasks executed on the CompSSD . However, current cache management strategies are optimized for traditional SSDs and are incompatible with the unique requirements of CompSSD . To address the issue of cache management for CompSSD , this article proposes a novel cache division scheme, to dynamically divide the cache into two parts, for separately buffering output data from host-side tasks and input data used by CompSSD -side tasks. To this end, we construct a mathematical model that periodically estimate an optimal cache division ratio, by considering the factors of the ratios of read/write data amount, the cache hits, and the overhead of data transfer between the storage device and the host. Besides, we propose a scheme of proactive data flushing to write the output data to the underlying flash arrays, without impacts on I/O responsiveness. The trace-driven experiments show that our scheme can improve the overall I/O latency by 35.4% on average, in contrast to existing cache management schemes for CompSSD devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算型SSD（CompSSD）具有较高的计算能力，不仅可以作为存储设备，还可以作为计算节点。 CompSSD 设备的数据缓存存储主机端任务的输出数据和在 CompSSD 上执行的任务的输入数据。然而，当前的缓存管理策略是针对传统SSD进行优化的，与CompSSD的独特要求不兼容。针对CompSSD的缓存管理问题，本文提出了一种新颖的缓存划分方案，将缓存动态划分为两部分，分别缓冲主机端任务的输出数据和CompSSD端任务使用的输入数据。为此，我们构建了一个数学模型，通过考虑读/写数据量比率、缓存命中以及存储设备和主机之间的数据传输开销等因素，定期估计最佳缓存划分比率。此外，我们提出了一种主动数据刷新方案，将输出数据写入底层闪存阵列，而不影响 I/O 响应能力。跟踪驱动的实验表明，与 CompSSD 设备现有的缓存管理方案相比，我们的方案可以将整体 I/O 延迟平均提高 35.4%。

papers.title: Taming Flexible Job Packing in Deep Learning Training Clusters.
papers.abstract: Job packing is an effective technique to harvest the idle resources allocated to the deep learning (DL) training jobs but not fully utilized, especially when clusters may experience low utilization, and users may overestimate their resource needs. However, existing job packing techniques tend to be conservative due to the mismatch in scope and granularity between job packing and cluster scheduling. In particular, tapping the potential of job packing in the training cluster requires a local and fine-grained coordination mechanism. To this end, we propose a novel job-packing middleware named Gimbal , which operates between the cluster scheduler and the hardware resources. As middleware, Gimbal must not only facilitate coordination among the packed jobs but also support various scheduling objectives of different schedulers. Gimbal achieves dual functionality by introducing a set of worker calibration primitives designed to calibrate workers’ execution status in a fine-grained manner. The primitives obscure the complexity of the underlying job and resource management mechanisms, thus offering the generality and extensibility for crafting coordination policies tailored to various scheduling objectives. We implement Gimbal on a real-world GPU cluster and evaluate it with a set of representative DL training jobs. The results show that Gimbal improves different scheduling objectives up to 1.32× compared with the state-of-the-art job packing techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 作业打包是一种有效的技术，可以收集分配给深度学习 (DL) 训练作业但未充分利用的闲置资源，特别是当集群利用率较低且用户可能高估其资源需求时。然而，由于作业打包和集群调度之间的范围和粒度不匹配，现有的作业打包技术往往比较保守。特别是，挖掘培训集群的岗位包装潜力，需要本地化、细粒度的协调机制。为此，我们提出了一种名为 Gimbal 的新型作业打包中间件，它在集群调度程序和硬件资源之间运行。作为中间件，Gimbal 不仅要促进打包作业之间的协调，还要支持不同调度器的各种调度目标。 Gimbal 通过引入一组工作器校准原语来实现双重功能，这些校准原语旨在以细粒度的方式校准工作器的执行状态。这些原语掩盖了底层作业和资源管理机制的复杂性，从而为制定适合各种调度目标的协调策略提供了通用性和可扩展性。我们在现实世界的 GPU 集群上实现 Gimbal，并使用一组代表性的 DL 训练作业对其进行评估。结果表明，与最先进的作业打包技术相比，Gimbal 将不同的调度目标提高了 1.32 倍。

papers.title: TianheGraph: Topology-aware Graph Processing.
papers.abstract: Many real-world graph data can have billions to trillions of edges. Processing graphs at such scales requires the efficient use of parallel computing systems. However, current graph processing engines and methods struggle to scale beyond a few dozen computing nodes because they (i) cannot efficiently store and process graph data on this scale due to the huge memory footprint incurred and (ii) do not account for the variations in communication costs across different levels of the interconnection hierarchy. We introduce TianheGraph, a software approach to reduce the memory footprint of graphs and optimize graph processing on large-scale parallel systems with complex hardware interconnection components. TianheGraph integrates a new space-time-efficient graph compression technique to reduce the memory footprint of large-scale graphs. It provides a novel graph partitioning method to improve load balancing and minimize communication overhead across various levels of the interconnection hierarchy. We evaluate TianheGraph by applying it to fundamental graph operations on synthetic and real-world graphs, using up to 79,024 computing nodes and over 1.2 million processor cores. Our extensive experiments show that TianheGraph outperforms state-of-the-art parallel graph processing engines in throughput and scalability. Moreover, TianheGraph outperformed the top-ranked systems on the Graph 500 list at the time of submission.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的图形数据可能有数十亿到数万亿条边。处理如此规模的图形需要有效使用并行计算系统。然而，当前的图处理引擎和方法很难扩展到超过几十个计算节点，因为它们（i）由于产生巨大的内存占用而无法有效地存储和处理这种规模的图数据，并且（ii）没有考虑互连层次结构不同级别之间的通信成本的变化。我们介绍了 TianheGraph，这是一种软件方法，可减少图的内存占用并优化具有复杂硬件互连组件的大规模并行系统上的图处理。 TianheGraph集成了一种新的时空高效图压缩技术，以减少大规模图的内存占用。它提供了一种新颖的图分区方法，以改善负载平衡并最大限度地减少互连层次结构各个级别之间的通信开销。我们通过将 TianheGraph 应用于合成图和真实世界图的基本图操作来评估它，使用多达 79,024 个计算节点和超过 120 万个处理器核心。我们大量的实验表明，TianheGraph 在吞吐量和可扩展性方面优于最先进的并行图处理引擎。此外，在提交时，TianheGraph 的性能优于 Graph 500 列表中排名靠前的系统。

papers.title: Tiaozhuan: A General and Efficient Indirect Branch Optimization for Binary Translation.
papers.abstract: Binary translation enables transparent execution, analysis, and modification of the binary program, serving as a core technology that facilitates instruction set emulation, cross-platform compatibility of software, and program instrumentation. Handling indirect branch instructions is widely recognized as a significant performance bottleneck in binary translation. While the target of a direct branch can be determined during the translation phase, an indirect branch requires a runtime lookup from the guest program counter to the host program counter, significantly influencing the performance of translator. Although several methods have been proposed to accelerate this process, each guest indirect branch instruction still translates into approximately 10 host instructions, resulting in considerable overhead. This article introduces Tiaozhuan, which addresses this issue by employing two optimization schemes. First, full address mapping uses a larger address space to store address mappings from guest to host, effectively reducing the number of instructions required to lookup the target of an indirect branch. Second, exceptionassisted branch elimination further eliminates branch instructions that check target correctness of targets in the lookup process.
