In addition, it adopts a lightweight address tracker to reduce the cost of address tracking for fast recovery. Experiments show that compared to the state-of-the-art schemes, SecNVM improves the performance and decreases write traffic a lot, and achieves an acceptable recovery time.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据安全是非易失性存储器（NVM）系统不可或缺的一部分。然而，在NVM上有效地实现数据安全具有挑战性，因为我们必须保证用户数据和相关安全元数据的一致性。现有的一致性方案忽略了SGX样式完整性树（SIT）的可恢复性以及元数据块之间的访问相关性，从而产生了不必要的NVM写入流量。在本文中，我们提出了 SecNVM，一种用于安全 NVM 的高效且写入友好的元数据崩溃一致性方案。 SecNVM 利用这样的观察结果：对于延迟更新的 SIT，崩溃后丢失的树节点可以由 NVM 中相应的子节点恢复。它通过受限制的回写元数据缓存减少了 SIT 持久性开销，并利用 SIT 层间依赖性进行恢复。接下来，利用计数器和DMAC之间强大的访问相关性，SecNVM通过新颖的协作计数器DMAC方案提高了安全元数据访问的效率。此外，它采用轻量级地址跟踪器，降低地址跟踪成本，实现快速恢复。实验表明，与最先进的方案相比，SecNVM 大大提高了性能并减少了写入流量，并实现了可接受的恢复时间。

papers.title: SIMD-Matcher: A SIMD-based Arbitrary Matching Framework.
papers.abstract: Packet classification methods rely upon matching packet content/header against pre-defined rules, which are generated by network applications and their configurations. With the rapid development of network technology and the fast-growing network applications, users seek more enhanced, secure, and diverse network services. Hence it becomes critical to improve the performance of arbitrary matching operations. This article presents SIMD-Matcher, an efficient Single Instruction Multiple Data (SIMD) and cache-friendly arbitrary matching framework. To further improve the arbitrary matching performance, SIMD-Matcher adopts a trie node with a fixed high fanout and a varying span for each node depending on the data distribution. The trie node layout leverages cache and modern processor features such as SIMD instructions. To support arbitrary matching, we first interpret arbitrary rules into three fields: value, mask, and priority. Second, to support insertion of randomly positioned wildcards to arbitrary rules, we propose the SIMD-Matcher extraction algorithm to process the wildcard bits. Third, we add an array of wildcard entries to the leaf entries, which store the wildcard rules and guarantee the correctness of matching results. Experiments show that SIMD-Matcher outperforms GenMatcher under large-scale ruleset and key set, in terms of search time, insert time, and memory cost. Specifically with 5M rules, our method achieves a 2.7X speedup on search time, and the insertion time takes \( ~\sim \!\! 7.3 \) seconds, gaining a 1.38X speedup; meanwhile, the memory cost reduction is up to 6.17X.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据包分类方法依赖于将数据包内容/标头与预定义规则进行匹配，这些规则是由网络应用程序及其配置生成的。随着网络技术的快速发展和网络应用的快速增长，用户寻求更加增强、安全、多样化的网络服务。因此，提高任意匹配操作的性能变得至关重要。本文介绍了 SIMD-Matcher，这是一种高效的单指令多数据 (SIMD) 和缓存友好的任意匹配框架。为了进一步提高任意匹配性能，SIMD-Matcher 采用了 trie 节点，该节点具有固定的高扇出，并且每个节点的跨度根据数据分布而变化。 trie 节点布局利用缓存和现代处理器功能（例如 SIMD 指令）。为了支持任意匹配，我们首先将任意规则解释为三个字段：值、掩码和优先级。其次，为了支持将随机定位的通配符插入任意规则，我们提出了 SIMD-Matcher 提取算法来处理通配符位。第三，我们在叶子条目中添加一个通配符条目数组，该数组存储通配符规则并保证匹配结果的正确性。实验表明，在大规模规则集和密钥集下，SIMD-Matcher 在搜索时间、插入时间和内存成本方面优于 GenMatcher。具体来说，使用 5M 规则，我们的方法在搜索时间上实现了 2.7 倍的加速，插入时间需要 \( ~\sim \!\! 7.3 \) 秒，获得了 1.38 倍的加速；同时，内存成本降低高达6.17倍。

papers.title: SMT-Based Contention-Free Task Mapping and Scheduling on 2D/3D SMART NoC with Mixed Dimension-Order Routing.
papers.abstract: SMART NoCs achieve ultra-low latency by enabling single-cycle multiple-hop transmission via bypass channels. However, contention along bypass channels can seriously degrade the performance of SMART NoCs by breaking the bypass paths. Therefore, contention-free task mapping and scheduling are essential for optimal system performance. In this article, we propose an SMT (Satisfiability Modulo Theories)-based framework to find optimal contention-free task mappings with minimum application schedule lengths on 2D/3D SMART NoCs with mixed dimension-order routing. On top of SMT’s fast reasoning capability for conditional constraints, we develop efficient search-space reduction techniques to achieve practical scalability. Experiments demonstrate that our SMT framework achieves 10× higher scalability than ILP (Integer Linear Programming) with 931.1× (ranges from 2.2× to 1532.1×) and 1237.1× (ranges from 4× to 4373.8×) faster average runtimes for finding optimum solutions on 2D and 3D SMART NoCs and our 2D and 3D extensions of the SMT framework with mixed dimension-order routing also maintain the improved scalability with the extended and diversified routing paths, resulting in reduced application schedule lengths throughout various application benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: SMART NoC 通过旁路通道实现单周期多跳传输，从而实现超低延迟。然而，旁路通道上的争用会破坏旁路路径，从而严重降低 SMART NoC 的性能。因此，无争用的任务映射和调度对于优化系统性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 SMT（可满足性模理论）的框架，用于在具有混合维度顺序路由的 2D/3D SMART NoC 上找到具有最小应用程序调度长度的最佳无争用任务映射。除了 SMT 针对条件约束的快速推理能力之外，我们还开发了高效的搜索空间缩减技术，以实现实际的可扩展性。实验表明，我们的 SMT 框架实现了比 ILP（整数线性规划）高 10 倍的可扩展性，平均运行时间加快了 931.1 倍（范围从 2.2 倍到 1532.1 倍）和 1237.1 倍（范围从 4 倍到 4373.8 倍），可以在 2D 和 3D SMART NoC 以及我们的 SMT 框架的 2D 和 3D 扩展上找到最佳解决方案。混合维序路由还通过扩展和多样化的路由路径保持了改进的可扩展性，从而缩短了各种应用程序基准测试中的应用程序调度长度。

papers.title: Solving Sparse Assignment Problems on FPGAs.
papers.abstract: The assignment problem is a fundamental optimization problem and a crucial part of many systems. For example, in multiple object tracking, the assignment problem is used to associate object detections with hypothetical target tracks and solving the assignment problem is one of the most compute-intensive tasks. To enable low-latency real-time implementations, efficient solutions to the assignment problem is required. In this work, we present Sparse and Speculative (SaS) Auction, a novel implementation of the popular Auction algorithm for FPGAs. Two novel optimizations are proposed. First, the pipeline width and depth are reduced by exploiting sparsity in the input problems. Second, dependency speculation is employed to enable a fully pipelined design and increase the throughput. Speedups as high as 50 × are achieved relative to the state-of-the-art implementation for some input distributions. We evaluate the implementation both on randomly generated datasets and realistic datasets from multiple object tracking.
papers.abstract_zh: 分配问题是一个基本的优化问题，也是许多系统的关键部分。例如，在多对象跟踪中，分配问题用于将对象检测与假设的目标轨迹相关联，并且解决分配问题是计算最密集的任务之一。为了实现低延迟实时实现，需要有效的解决分配问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了稀疏和推测 (SaS) 拍卖，这是流行的 FPGA 拍卖算法的一种新颖实现。提出了两种新颖的优化。首先，通过利用输入问题的稀疏性来减少管道的宽度和深度。其次，采用依赖推测来实现完全流水线设计并提高吞吐量。相对于某些输入分布的最先进实现，速度提升高达 50 倍。我们在随机生成的数据集和来自多个对象跟踪的实际数据集上评估实施情况。

papers.title: Task-RM: A Resource Manager for Energy Reduction in Task-Parallel Applications under Quality of Service Constraints.
papers.abstract: Improving energy efficiency is an important goal of computer system design. This article focuses on a general model of task-parallel applications under quality-of-service requirements on the completion time. Our technique, called Task-RM , exploits the variance in task execution-times and imbalance between tasks to allocate just enough resources in terms of voltage-frequency and core-allocation so that the application completes before the deadline. Moreover, we provide a solution that can harness additional energy savings with the availability of additional processors. We observe that, for the proposed run-time resource manager to allocate resources, it requires specification of the soft deadlines to the tasks. This is accomplished by analyzing the energy-saving scenarios offline and by providing Task-RM with the performance requirements of the tasks. The evaluation shows an energy saving of 33% compared to race-to-idle and 22% compared to dynamic slack allocation (DSA) with an overhead of less than 1%.
papers.abstract_zh: 提高能源效率是计算机系统设计的一个重要目标。本文重点讨论服务质量要求下完成时间的任务并行应用程序的通用模型。我们的技术称为 Task-RM，利用任务执行时间的差异和任务之间的不平衡来分配足够的资源（在电压频率和核心分配方面），以便应用程序在截止日期之前完成。此外，我们提供的解决方案可以通过使用额外的处理器来进一步节省能源。我们观察到，对于建议的运行时资源管理器来分配资源，它需要指定任务的软截止日期。这是通过离线分析节能场景并向 Task-RM 提供任务的性能要求来完成的。评估显示，与竞态空闲分配相比，节能 33%，与动态松弛分配 (DSA) 相比，节能 22%，且开销不到 1%。

papers.title: The Forward Slice Core: A High-Performance, Yet Low-Complexity Microarchitecture.
papers.abstract: Superscalar out-of-order cores deliver high performance at the cost of increased complexity and power budget. In-order cores, in contrast, are less complex and have a smaller power budget, but offer low performance. A processor architecture should ideally provide high performance in a power- and cost-efficient manner. Recently proposed slice-out-of-order (sOoO) cores identify backward slices of memory operations which they execute out-of-order with respect to the rest of the dynamic instruction stream for increased instruction-level and memory-hierarchy parallelism. Unfortunately, constructing backward slices is imprecise and hardware-inefficient, leaving performance on the table. In this article, we propose Forward Slice Core (FSC ), a novel core microarchitecture that builds on a stall-on-use in-order core and extracts more instruction-level and memory-hierarchy parallelism than slice-out-of-order cores. FSC does so by identifying and steering forward slices (rather than backward slices) to dedicated in-order FIFO queues. Moreover, FSC puts load-consumers that depend on L1 D-cache misses on the side to enable younger independent load-consumers to execute faster. Finally, FSC eliminates the need for dynamic memory disambiguation by replicating store-address instructions across queues. Considering 3-wide pipeline configurations, we find that FSC improves performance by 27.1%, 21.1%, and 14.6% on average compared to Freeway, the state-of-the-art sOoO core, across SPEC CPU2017, GAP, and DaCapo, respectively, while at the same time incurring reduced hardware complexity. Compared to an OoO core, FSC reduces power consumption by 61.3% and chip area by 47%, providing a microarchitecture with high performance at low complexity.
papers.abstract_zh: 超标量乱序内核可提供高性能，但代价是增加复杂性和功耗预算。相比之下，有序内核的复杂性较低，功耗预算也较小，但性能较低。理想情况下，处理器架构应以节能且经济高效的方式提供高性能。最近提出的乱序切片 (sOoO) 内核识别向后的内存操作切片，它们相对于动态指令流的其余部分乱序执行这些操作，以提高指令级和内存层次结构的并行性。不幸的是，构建向后切片不精确且硬件效率低下，导致性能受到影响。在本文中，我们提出了前向切片核心（FSC），这是一种新颖的核心微架构，它构建在使用时停止的有序核心上，并比切片乱序核心提取更多的指令级和内存层次结构并行性。 FSC 通过识别前向切片（而不是后向切片）并将其引导至专用的有序 FIFO 队列来实现此目的。此外，FSC 将依赖于 L1 D 缓存未命中的负载消费者放在一边，以使年轻的独立负载消费者能够更快地执行。最后，FSC 通过跨队列复制存储地址指令，消除了动态内存消歧的需要。考虑到 3 宽管道配置，我们发现，与最先进的 sOoO 核心 Freeway 相比，FSC 在 SPEC CPU2017、GAP 和 DaCapo 上的性能平均提高了 27.1%、21.1% 和 14.6%，同时降低了硬件复杂性。与 OoO 内核相比，FSC 功耗降低了 61.3%，芯片面积降低了 47%，提供了高性能、低复杂度的微架构。

papers.title: TLB-pilot: Mitigating TLB Contention Attack on GPUs with Microarchitecture-Aware Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Co-running GPU kernels on a single GPU can provide high system throughput and improve hardware utilization, but this raises concerns on application security. We reveal that translation lookaside buffer (TLB) attack, one of the common attacks on CPU, can happen on GPU when multiple GPU kernels co-run. We investigate conditions or principles under which a TLB attack can take effect, including the awareness of GPU TLB microarchitecture, being lightweight, and bypassing existing software and hardware mechanisms. This TLB-based attack can be leveraged to conduct Denial-of-Service (or Degradation-of-Service) attacks. Furthermore, we propose a solution to mitigate TLB attacks. In particular, based on the microarchitecture properties of GPU, we introduce a software-based system, TLB-pilot, that binds thread blocks of different kernels to different groups of streaming multiprocessors by considering hardware isolation of last-level TLBs and the application’s resource requirement. TLB-pilot employs lightweight online profiling to collect kernel information before kernel launches. By coordinating software- and hardware-based scheduling and employing a kernel splitting scheme to reduce load imbalance, TLB-pilot effectively mitigates TLB attacks. The result shows that when under TLB attack, TLB-pilot mitigates the attack and provides on average 56.2% and 60.6% improvement in average normalized turnaround times and overall system throughput, respectively, compared to the traditional Multi-Process Service based co-running solution. When under TLB attack, TLB-pilot also provides up to 47.3% and 64.3% improvement (41% and 42.9% on average) in average normalized turnaround times and overall system throughput, respectively, compared to a state-of-the-art co-running solution for efficiently scheduling of thread blocks.
papers.abstract_zh: 在单个 GPU 上共同运行 GPU 内核可以提供高系统吞吐量并提高硬件利用率，但这引起了对应用程序安全性的担忧。我们发现，当多个 GPU 内核同时运行时，转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 攻击是对 CPU 的常见攻击之一，也可能在 GPU 上发生。我们研究TLB攻击生效的条件或原理，包括GPU TLB微架构的感知、轻量级以及绕过现有的软硬件机制。这种基于 TLB 的攻击可用于进行拒绝服务（或服务降级）攻击。此外，我们提出了一种缓解 TLB 攻击的解决方案。特别是，基于GPU的微架构特性，我们引入了一种基于软件的系统TLB-pilot，通过考虑最后一级TLB的硬件隔离和应用程序的资源需求，将不同内核的线程块绑定到不同组的流式多处理器。 TLB-pilot 采用轻量级在线分析在内核启动之前收集内核信息。通过协调基于软件和硬件的调度并采用内核分裂方案来减少负载不平衡，TLB-pilot 可以有效缓解 TLB 攻击。结果表明，当受到 TLB 攻击时，TLB-pilot 可以缓解攻击，与传统的基于多进程服务的协同运行解决方案相比，平均标准化周转时间和整体系统吞吐量分别平均提高 56.2% 和 60.6%。当受到 TLB 攻击时，与用于高效调度线程块的最先进的协同运行解决方案相比，TLB-pilot 的平均标准化周转时间和整体系统吞吐量分别提高了 47.3% 和 64.3%（平均 41% 和 42.9%）。

papers.title: Triangle Dropping: An Occluded-geometry Predictor for Energy-efficient Mobile GPUs.
papers.abstract: This article proposes a novel micro-architecture approach for mobile GPUs aimed at early removing the occluded geometry in a scene by leveraging frame-to-frame coherence, thus reducing the overall energy consumption. Mobile GPUs commonly implement a Tile-Based Rendering (TBR) architecture that differentiates two main phases: the Geometry Pipeline , where all the geometry of a scene is processed; and the Raster Pipeline , where primitives are rendered in a framebuffer. After the Geometry Pipeline, only non-culled primitives inside the camera’s frustum are stored into the Parameter Buffer , a data structure stored in DRAM. However, among the non-culled primitives there is a significant amount that are rendered but non-visible at all , resulting in useless computations. On average, 60% of those primitives are completely occluded in our benchmarks. Despite TBR architectures use on-chip caches for the Parameter Buffer, about 46% of the DRAM traffic still comes from accesses to such buffer. The proposed Triangle Dropping technique leverages the visibility information computed along the Raster Pipeline to predict the primitives’ visibility in the next frame to early discard those that will be totally occluded, drastically reducing Parameter Buffer accesses. On average, our approach achieves overall 14.5% energy savings, 28.2% energy-delay product savings, and a speedup of 20.2%.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于移动 GPU 的新颖微架构方法，旨在通过利用帧到帧的一致性来尽早消除场景中被遮挡的几何图形，从而降低总体能耗。移动 GPU 通常实现基于图块的渲染 (TBR) 架构，该架构区分两个主要阶段： 几何管道 ，其中处理场景的所有几何图形；以及光栅管道，其中基元在帧缓冲区中渲染。在几何管道之后，只有相机视锥体内未剔除的图元才会存储到参数缓冲区（参数缓冲区）中，参数缓冲区是存储在 DRAM 中的数据结构。然而，在未剔除的图元中，有大量已渲染但根本不可见，从而导致无用的计算。平均而言，60% 的基元在我们的基准测试中被完全遮挡。尽管 TBR 架构使用片上缓存作为参数缓冲区，但大约 46% 的 DRAM 流量仍然来自对此类缓冲区的访问。所提出的三角形丢弃技术利用沿光栅管道计算的可见性信息来预测下一帧中图元的可见性，以尽早丢弃那些将完全被遮挡的图元，从而大大减少参数缓冲区访问。平均而言，我们的方法总体节能 14.5%，节能产品节能 28.2%，加速 20.2%。

papers.title: Using Barrier Elision to Improve Transactional Code Generation.
papers.abstract: With chip manufacturers such as Intel, IBM, and ARM offering native support for transactional memory in their instruction set architectures, memory transactions are on the verge of being considered a genuine application tool rather than just an interesting research topic. Despite this recent increase in popularity on the hardware side of transactional memory (HTM) , software support for transactional memory (STM) is still scarce and the only compiler with transactional support currently available, the GNU Compiler Collection (GCC) , does not generate code that achieves desirable performance. For hybrid solutions of TM (HyTM) , which are frameworks that leverage the best aspects of HTM and STM, the subpar performance of the software side, caused by inefficient compiler generated code, might forbid HyTM to offer optimal results. This article extends previous work focused exclusively on STM implementations by presenting a detailed analysis of transactional code generated by GCC in the context of HybridTM implementations. In particular, it builds on previous research of transactional memory support in the Clang/LLVM compiler framework, which is decoupled from any TM runtime, and presents the following novel contributions: (a) it shows that STM’s performance overhead, due to an excessive amount of read and write barriers added by the compiler, also impacts the performance of HyTM systems; and (b) it reveals the importance of the previously proposed annotation mechanism to reduce the performance gap between HTM and STM in phased runtime systems. Furthermore, it shows that, by correctly using the annotations on just a few lines of code, it is possible to reduce the total number of instrumented barriers by 95% and to achieve speed-ups of up to 7× when compared to the original code generated by GCC and the Clang compiler. 1
papers.abstract_zh: 随着英特尔、IBM 和 ARM 等芯片制造商在其指令集架构中提供对事务内存的本机支持，内存事务即将被视为真正的应用工具，而不仅仅是一个有趣的研究主题。尽管事务内存 (HTM) 的硬件方面最近越来越受欢迎，但对事务内存 (STM) 的软件支持仍然很少，并且当前唯一提供事务支持的编译器 GNU 编译器集合 (GCC) 无法生成达到理想性能的代码。对于 TM (HyTM) 的混合解决方案（这些框架利用了 HTM 和 STM 的最佳方面），由于编译器生成的代码效率低下而导致软件方面的性能不佳，可能会阻止 HyTM 提供最佳结果。本文通过在 HybridTM 实现的上下文中对 GCC 生成的事务代码进行详细分析，扩展了之前专门关注 STM 实现的工作。特别是，它建立在先前对 Clang/LLVM 编译器框架中事务内存支持的研究基础上，该框架与任何 TM 运行时解耦，并提出了以下新颖的贡献：（a）它表明，由于编译器添加的过多读写障碍，STM 的性能开销也会影响 HyTM 系统的性能； (b)它揭示了先前提出的注释机制对于缩小阶段运行时系统中 HTM 和 STM 之间的性能差距的重要性。此外，它表明，通过在几行代码上正确使用注释，与 GCC 和 Clang 编译器生成的原始代码相比，可以将检测障碍的总数减少 95%，并实现高达 7 倍的加速。 1

papers.title: Weaving Synchronous Reactions into the Fabric of SSA-form Compilers.
papers.abstract: We investigate the programming of reactive systems combining closed-loop control with performance-intensive components such as Machine Learning (ML). Reactive control systems are often safety-critical and associated with real-time execution requirements, a domain of predilection for synchronous programming languages. Extending the high levels of assurance found in reactive control systems to computationally intensive code remains an open issue. We tackle it by unifying concepts and algorithms from synchronous languages with abstractions commonly found in general-purpose and ML compilers. This unification across embedded and high-performance computing enables a high degree of reuse of compiler abstractions and code. We first recall commonalities between dataflow synchronous languages and the static single assignment (SSA) form of general-purpose/ML compilers. We highlight the key mechanisms of synchronous languages that SSA does not cover—denotational concepts such as synchronizing computations with an external time base, cyclic and reactive I/O, as well as the operational notions of relaxing control flow dominance and the modeling of absent values. We discover that initialization-related static analyses and code generation aspects can be fully decoupled from other aspects of synchronous semantics such as memory management and causality analysis, the latter being covered by existing dominance-based algorithms of SSA-form compilers. We show how the SSA form can be seamlessly extended to enable all SSA-based transformations and optimizations on reactive programs with synchronous concurrency. We derive a compilation flow suitable for both high-performance and reactive aspects of a control application, by embedding the Lustre dataflow synchronous language into the SSA-based MLIR/LLVM compiler infrastructure. This allows the modeling of signal processing and deep neural network inference in the (closed) loop of feedback-directed control systems. With only minor efforts leveraging the MLIR infrastructure, the generated code matches or outperforms state-of-the-art synchronous language compilers on computationally intensive ML applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究将闭环控制与机器学习 (ML) 等性能密集型组件相结合的反应式系统编程。反应控制系统通常是安全关键的，并且与实时执行要求相关，这是同步编程语言的偏爱领域。将反应控制系统中的高水平保证扩展到计算密集型代码仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们通过将同步语言的概念和算法与通用和机器学习编译器中常见的抽象相统一来解决这个问题。这种跨嵌入式和高性能计算的统一实现了编译器抽象和代码的高度重用。我们首先回顾一下数据流同步语言和通用/ML 编译器的静态单赋值 (SSA) 形式之间的共性。我们重点介绍 SSA 未涵盖的同步语言的关键机制——指称概念，例如与外部时基同步计算、循环和反应式 I/O，以及放松控制流主导的操作概念和缺失值的建模。我们发现与初始化相关的静态分析和代码生成方面可以与同步语义的其他方面（例如内存管理和因果关系分析）完全解耦，后者由现有的 SSA 形式编译器的基于优势的算法覆盖。我们展示了如何无缝扩展 SSA 形式，以在具有同步并发的反应式程序上启用所有基于 SSA 的转换和优化。通过将 Lustre 数据流同步语言嵌入到基于 SSA 的 MLIR/LLVM 编译器基础设施中，我们得出了适合控制应用程序的高性能和反应性方面的编译流程。这允许在反馈引导控制系统的（闭）环中对信号处理和深度神经网络推理进行建模。只需利用 MLIR 基础设施进行少量努力，生成的代码就可以在计算密集型 ML 应用程序上匹配或优于最先进的同步语言编译器。
